programme.desc: Quiz that tests contestants skill at darts and their general knowledge

programme.title: The Chase
programme.desc: Bradley Walsh presents as four contestants pit their wits against ruthless quiz genius the Chaser in the hope of winning a potential prize pot worth thousands of pounds. They work as a team and play strategically to answer general knowledge questions against the clock and race down the game board to the exit without being caught

programme.title: The Chase
programme.desc: Bradley Walsh presents as four contestants pit their wits against ruthless quiz genius the Chaser in the hope of winning a potential prize pot worth thousands of pounds. They work as a team and play strategically to answer general knowledge questions against the clock and race down the game board to the exit without being caught

programme.title: The Chase Celebrity Special
programme.desc: Bradley Walsh presents as celebrity contestants Melanie Sykes, Heather Small, Andrew Castle and Graeme Le Saux pit their wits against ruthless quiz genius the Chaser in the hope of winning a potential prize pot worth thousands of pounds. They must work as a team and play strategically to answer general knowledge questions against the clock and race down the game board to the exit without being caught

programme.title: Jerry and Marge Go Large (2022)
programme.desc: A couple discover a mathematical loophole in the Massachusetts lottery and win millions to revive and rejuvenate their small town. Comedy drama based on a true story, starring Bryan Cranston, Annette Bening, Rainn Wilson and Larry Wilmore

programme.title: Ramsays Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay tries to help a struggling seafood restaurant in Manhattan, where the three owners regularly come into conflict as they each try to assert their authority over the business, causing confusion for all. When one of the trio stubbornly resists the changes the Scottish chef is hoping to implement, sparks begin to fly

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The competition kicks off in Worcestershire, where friends Geri Atterbury and Lorraine Rigby invite guests to stay at Greenways of Malvern. On arrival, couple Sean McGahern and Maxine Parker are not impressed by the wild wallpaper, and the lack of an en-suite dismays mother-and-son duo Sarah and Luke Allaway

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The owners visit the Royal Forester at Bewdley in Worcestershire for their second stay, with proprietors Sean McGahern and Maxine Parker hoping to impress their guests with a trip to a local safari park. Sarah and Luke are impressed with their colourful room, but Sanjeev and Elinor have a hairy experience

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: From Ferry Lodge in Holyhead, Anglesey, where mother-and-son duo Sarah and Luke Allaway hope to impress the other contestants. However, things do not get off to a good start when Geri and Lorraine are overwhelmed by the number of laminated signs, Sean and Maxine begrudge paying 50p for toiletries and Sanjeev and Elinor are left unimpressed by the cleanliness of the establishment

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Partners Sanjeev Bhagotra and Elinor Roberts welcome their guests to Court Colman Manor, Bridgend, Glamorgan. Sean McGahern and Maxine Parker are pleased with the size of their room on arrival, but Sarah Allaway discovers a collection of cobwebs in hers. During the afternoon, the groups take a lesson in fire-making, and the next morning a traditional Welsh breakfast is not to everyones taste - with the hosts wondering whether tactical voting has played a part come feedback time

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The BandB owners meet one last time to find out what they have been paid. Geri kicks off proceedings by demanding to know why Sarah and Luke did not want a return visit to Greenways of Malvern, before they in turn confront Sanjeev and Elinor over their low cleanliness score for Ferry Lodge. Then the Court Colman Manor proprietors accuse Sarah and Luke of unfairly judging their hotel, before the payments are revealed and the winners are announced

programme.title: Kirsties House of Craft
programme.desc: Kirstie Allsopp makes colourful recycled candles and a fun painted pebble game with her sons, and demonstrates how to make loo roll animals

programme.title: Couples Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Three couples in Greater Manchester compete in the culinary challenge - caravan enthusiasts Jane and Colin, party-loving Rachel and Dave, and Martyn and Russell who host a night with sparkle. In order to win the £1,000 prize some of the hosts pull out all the stops - with desserts even arriving via zip wire

programme.title: The King of Queens
programme.desc: Dougs parents come to stay while Carrie is on a business trip, but insist on treating him like a kid. Arthur designs a new type of screwdriver and manufactures thousands of them when a hardware store shows an interest. Comedy, starring Jerry Stiller

programme.title: The King of Queens
programme.desc: Doug is pleased when Carrie starts having a drink with her colleagues every evening, because it takes her mind off his new diet. After she falls out with her pals, however, he begins providing her with alcohol at home, hoping he can keep her relaxed behaviour going a little longer. Comedy, guest starring Lou Ferrigno, with Kevin James and Leah Remini

programme.title: The King of Queens
programme.desc: The Heffernans eagerly look forward to a high-school reunion, but Doug hates Carries new sensible hairdo and wants her to change it for something a little sexier. But telling her without hurting her feelings proves harder than expected. Kevin James stars

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Ray discovers the stone in Debras engagement ring is a fake, and decides to get it changed without telling her - only to learn afterwards that she had beaten him to the punch and had her grandmothers $15,000 diamond put in. Meanwhile, Robert decides to surprise his new girlfriend with a change of hair colour

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: The Barones cable TV goes on the blink, leaving them with a large amount of time on their hands - which they fill by playing games. Ray Romano stars

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Debras accusation that Ray is pessimistic stirs him into adopting a more positive outlook, but the rest of the family is not impressed by his change in attitude. Figure skater Katarina Witt guests stars in the comedy, with Ray Romano

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: Roz goes on a date with a dustman, while Niles reminisces with Daphne about his childhood, and Frasier throws a party for the staff at the radio station in a bid to improve his image. Comedy, starring Kelsey Grammer and David Hyde Pierce

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: Niles has too much to drink at a Halloween party, and Frasier is taken aback to discover the children in his complex are afraid of him. Comedy, starring Kelsey Grammer and David Hyde Pierce

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: Domestic disharmony causes chaos in Frasiers apartment, leaving Martins beloved chair ruined and the carpet soiled. Meanwhile, Roz begins piano lessons. Comedy, starring Kelsey Grammer, John Mahoney and Jane Leeves

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.sub-title: The Day the Earth Stood Cool
programme.desc: Homer shakes off the shackles of his traditional lifestyle after hitting it off with his trendy new neighbours, who are the ultimate in cool - although Marge isnt too keen on the hipster clan, especially their parenting style. However, when Bart falls out with one of his new friends kids, the doughnut-loving dad soon sees them for what they really are. With the guest voices of Portlandia stars Fred Armisen and Carrie Brownstein, and Patton Oswalt (Young Adult)

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Homer doesnt seem to care when Santas Little Helper goes missing, puzzling the rest of his family who are all panicking about their missing pooch. So Grampa shares a story about his son, a certain childhood pet and a more youthful but no-less-bitter Mr Burns

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: A trip to an amusement park ends in disarray, prompting Homer to question the behaviour of his fellow man - and leading to an invitation for him to join a survivalist group preparing for the end of the world. As usual, its left to Marge to talk some sense into her hubby. Featuring the guest voice of music legend Tom Waits

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Springfield Elementary is threatened with closure over poor test scores, until it is revealed that one student missed the exam and could potentially save the school with an above-average mark. Unfortunately, that pupil turns out to be Bart - can he pull it out of the bag?

programme.title: A New Life in the Sun
programme.desc: After a long renovation, novice hosts Tom and Terry have a trial run for their vegan BandB in Spain, while test guests are also expected at Summer and Ashleys place in Italy. A busy summer season comes to a close for Paul and Fionas villa in France while, in Portugal, dreamers Louise and Shay find out if they can make it all a reality

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The BandB battle begins in Seaburn, Sunderland, where friends and business partners Mia and Emmanuel run the Mayfield Hotel, where the decor splits the guests opinions

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The BandBers are in Gateshead to visit the Sutherlands Hotel. Hugh and Loretta are in awe of the decor but Mia and Emmanuel are determined to dig up some dirt. There are surprising revelations over drinks in the evening before an impressive breakfast the next morning but the feedback leaves Heather and Paul with more questions than answers

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The third stay of the week is at Brampton Dales Farm in Gainsborough, Lincolnshire. The guests are unimpressed by some squeaky furniture but charmed by the furry welcome. Hugh and Loretta treat the BandBers to an afternoon out at an old jail, making the farm look like a palace in comparison

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The final visit of the week is to Valley View in Pendle, Lancashire, where sisters Sharon and Deby hope to get the BandBers onboard with the glamping experience. The spectacular views are universally admired, but the accommodation proves divisive, with Hugh comparing his glamping pod to a student flat

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The contestants meet one last time to discover how much they have been paid by their fellow hoteliers and to air their grievances. Mia and Emmanuel from the Mayfield Hotel want to clean up Heather and Pauls cleanliness comments, before they find themselves under the microscope for the exact same reason. Hugh and Loretta are keen to throw back the covers on Sharons sleep worries, before Sharon and her sister Deby reveal they didnt take too kindly to their digs being compared to a student flat

programme.title: Kirstie and Phils Love It or List It
programme.desc: Kirstie Allsopp and Phil Spencer help Ruth and Ken from Caterham, Surrey settle their debate over their three-storey town house. Since their children have flown the nest, the home isnt right for them anymore and Ruth is ready to sell but avid DIYer Ken wants to stay and thinks with some touch ups their home could still be the place for them

programme.title: Channel 4 News
programme.desc: Including sport and weather

programme.title: Transformers: Rise of the Beasts (2023)
programme.desc: In 1994 New York City, an ex-serviceman accepts a job to steal a sports car. The high-end vehicle turns out to be a robot in disguise, who propels him into the midst of a hunt for a precious Transwarp key. The device will allow Autobot leader Optimus Prime and his mechanised compatriots to return home to Cybertron. Fantasy prequel, starring Anthony Ramos and Dominique Fishback

programme.title: Jumanji: Welcome to the Jungle (2017)
programme.desc: Four teenagers play a jungle-themed game on an old console, only to find themselves transported into the game and transformed into its heroic characters. They must embark on a death-defying journey through the games wilderness setting to make it back to the real world, or be stuck as video game characters forever. Fantasy action comedy, starring Dwayne Johnson, Karen Gillan, Kevin Hart and Jack Black

programme.title: No Hard Feelings (2023)
programme.desc: Faced with the possibility of losing her mothers house, a woman called Maddie answers an advert from a married couple, who are offering a Buick Regal car to anyone willing to date their introverted 19-year-old son Percy before he attends college. Maddie promises to bring the teenager out of his shell. Comedy, starring Jennifer Lawrence and Andrew Barth Feldman

programme.title: Taskmaster
programme.desc: Joel Dommett, Joanna Page, Armando Iannucci, Kumail Nanjiani and Amy Gledhill leave their dignity at the door to take part in the comedy challenge show. They begin by hunting for a small creature, serving Taskmaster Greg Davies his fruit and vegetables and trying to catch a golden T-shirt - all under the watchful eye of Alex Horne

programme.title: Ramsays Hotel Hell
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay visits the allegedly haunted Cambridge Hotel in New York, run by former military man John Imhof and his wife Tina. John runs the business like a dictatorship - an approach that is upsetting staff and sending guests straight for the exits. Will the chef be able to use his experience in the restaurant business to save this struggling establishment from disaster?

programme.title: Couples Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Three Birmingham couples compete to host the best dinner party and win a cash prize. Amanda and her husband Anthony kick off the competition with an ambitious menu, before its the turn of festival lover Oli and his girlfriend LC, who prepare a vegetarian menu for their guests. However, their evening is tainted by Anthony, who upsets several of the guests with an untoward remark. Civil partners Steve and Sean try to put the weeks tension behind them as they focus on winning the cash prize

programme.title: George Clarkes Old House, New Home
programme.desc: The architect explores an arts and crafts-inspired house in Surrey. Built in the 1920s, it has tall chimneys, leaded windows, gabled ends and a steeply pitched roof. Sadly, it has Artex everywhere and incorporates some dubious design alterations. He sets out to help its owners turn it back into an elegant home for themselves and their three children. George also tackles a suburban home that has so many layers of wallpaper that peeling them back is like going back through a time warp

programme.title: Devon and Cornwall
programme.desc: Compilation of highlights from previous series. High up on Dartmoor, shepherds Steve and Crispin Alford ride their horses out to gather their sheep for a speed shearing competition. In Looe, on the south coast of Cornwall, the whole community is gearing up for one of the biggest events of the year - the one-mile wild swim from St Georges Island back to the town beach

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: A tornado hits Springfield and Marge and Homer have a brush with death that prompts them to think about who would look after their kids if the worst were to happen. But finding suitable guardians for their brood is no easy feat - until they bump into super-cool couple Mav and Portia. Hes a surfer and shes an environmental lawyer - but are they just too good to be true?

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.sub-title: The Day the Earth Stood Cool
programme.desc: Homer shakes off the shackles of his traditional lifestyle after hitting it off with his trendy new neighbours, who are the ultimate in cool - although Marge isnt too keen on the hipster clan, especially their parenting style. However, when Bart falls out with one of his new friends kids, the doughnut-loving dad soon sees them for what they really are. With the guest voices of Portlandia stars Fred Armisen and Carrie Brownstein, and Patton Oswalt (Young Adult)

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Springfield Elementary is threatened with closure over poor test scores, until it is revealed that one student missed the exam and could potentially save the school with an above-average mark. Unfortunately, that pupil turns out to be Bart - can he pull it out of the bag?

programme.title: The King of Queens
programme.desc: The couple decide to be charitable and donate funds to Deacons school library - but Carrie is more concerned with looking generous than actually helping people. Leah Remini stars

programme.title: The King of Queens
programme.desc: Doug and Deacon take $100 from the emergency fund to place a bet on a boxing match. But when they win $5,000, they have to spend it all in one day to stop Carrie finding out about the theft. Kevin James stars

programme.title: The King of Queens
programme.desc: Doug discovers Carrie used to have a crush on his dentist - who he is convinced is deliberately making his root canal operation as painful as possible. Comedy, starring Kevin James

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Ray and Robert both want to keep a stray bulldog that Ray brings home. It reminds Ray of a dog he had to give up as a child, but it turns out that the cute canine is not so stray after all. Comedy, starring Ray Romano

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: The neighbours are upset by the antics of Rays parents and gather at his house to thrash out a solution, but their meeting is gatecrashed by the troublesome pair

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: A psychotherapist arrives to interview Debra for a book on the American family, but finds the rest of the household far more captivating, leaving the humble housewife feeling left out

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: The Seattle shrink celebrates his 2,000th radio broadcast and is disappointed to find he has a recording of every show but one, forcing him to turn to an obsessive fan for a copy of the elusive tape. Guest starring computer tycoon Bill Gates

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: Niles and Frasier befriend Kirby, whose girlfriends grandfather is a well-known wine connoisseur. Martin is forced to wear a device to monitor his blood pressure. Comedy, starring Kelsey Grammer and David Hyde Pierce

programme.title: Sunday Brunch
programme.desc: Tim Lovejoy and Simon Rimmer are joined by guests Felicity Montagu, Fra Fee, Francis Bourgeois, and Leigh and Jill Francis. With music by Jordan Rakei

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: A dare lands Bart in hospital and he makes up a story that he went to Heaven and met Jesus, prompting Christian film producers to offer the Simpsons a movie deal

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Barts dream girl Mary Spuckler comes to town, but their relationship turns sour when he fails to pay her enough attention. Meanwhile, Homer lands himself in the doghouse after upsetting Marge once too often. With the guest voices of Benedict Cumberbatch and Zooey Deschanel

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Bart and Milhouse sample the perks of adulthood when a shaving experiment leaves one of the boys looking exactly like his father. Meanwhile, a preoccupied Marge tries to protect Maggie from the dangers of childrens TV

programme.title: George Clarkes Amazing Spaces
programme.sub-title: Circus Wagon, Tree Hotel and Camping Pod
programme.desc: The architect meets master craftsman Paul, who has muscular dystrophy and is saving a Victorian circus wagon. George also finds out about a grain store being re-imagined as a festival bar, discovers a small hotel disguised as a tree and a camping pod that looks like a giant conker

programme.title: Hamleys: Top 100 Toys of All Time
programme.desc: A celebration of the greatest toys of all time, as Jonathan Ross and daughter Honey, Alison Hammond and son Aidan and comedians and best friends Lou Sanders and Harriet Kemsley are given after-hours permission to run wild in the world-famous Hamleys toy shop on Regent Street to get their hands on the playthings they loved and longed for as children. The list features everything from Lego and Hungry Hippos to the pogo stick, Operation and the infamous clackers

programme.title: Soul (2020)
programme.desc: Joe Gardner is a middle school music teacher in New York City, who fervently believes that music is life. He auditions to play piano at a popular jazz club as part of a quartet led by Dorothea Williams. On his way home from impressing Dorothea, Joe tumbles down an open manhole and lingers in limbo between life and death. Animated fantasy, with the voices of Jamie Foxx and Tina Fey

programme.title: Channel 4 News
programme.desc: Including sport and weather

programme.title: Inside Legoland: Brick by Brick
programme.desc: Behind the scenes as one of the UKs busiest theme parks, meeting the army of designers, engineers and entertainers are working flat out to keep customers happy. From building a new entrance portal to rehearsing a high-octane stunt show just days before opening, the pressure is on. Add in intricate model making, ride upgrades and even feeding sharks, and its all hands on deck

programme.title: The Great Celebrity Bake Off for Stand Up to Cancer
programme.desc: Emmett J Scanlan, Mark Wright, Nella Rose, Mutya Buena and Ralf Little take part in the culinary challenge, with guest judge Cherish Finden joining regulars Paul Hollywood, Noel Fielding and Alison Hammond. The contestants make Signature pull-apart savoury rolls and grapple with vegan fruit tarts in the Technical. And for the Showstopper, the celebs recreate their most ridiculous purchase ever

programme.title: Your Song
programme.desc: Alison Hammond presents the show giving people the chance to perform the one song that tells their story - often in front of a crowd for the very first time. Mentors Paloma Faith and Sam Ryder watch and listen to the performances. In the first episode, Alison heads to Liverpool, where a teenager sings Bocelli for the foster mum he cant find words to thank, and a kidney transplant recipient brings Sam and Paloma sprinting out into the downpour. With only one place available at the grand final at Londons Hackney Empire, Sam and Paloma face an impossible choice

programme.title: Gogglebox
programme.desc: The armchair critics share their opinions on what they have been watching during the week, with cameras capturing their instant reactions

programme.title: First Dates
programme.desc: More hopefuls enter the restaurant looking to find the perfect match. Twenty-seven-year-old yoga instructor Nicole meets Matthew, a 24-year-old mindfulness coach. While they seem like the perfect combination for love, how will Nicole, whos only ever dated older men, react to finding out that Matthew is younger than her?

programme.title: Gogglebox
programme.desc: The armchair critics share their opinions on what they have been watching during the week, with cameras capturing their instant reactions and the lively discussions that are prompted by the weeks biggest and best shows

programme.title: Our Ladies (2019)
programme.desc: In 1990s Scotland, a group of Catholic school girls get an opportunity to go into Edinburgh for a choir competition, but theyre more interested in drinking, partying and hooking up than winning the competition. Comedy drama, starring Abigail Lawrie, Rona Morison and Marli Siu

programme.title: Ramsays Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: The chef takes on one of his toughest challenges yet, J Willys Bar and Grille in South Bend, Indiana, which has amassed debts of more than $1million. On finding an inexperienced chef serving food from both the freezer and tins, together with service that reduces one customer to tears, Gordon Ramsay orders an overnight deep-clean of the premises and designs a menu to inspire the kitchen staff

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: A dare lands Bart in hospital and he makes up a story that he went to Heaven and met Jesus, prompting Christian film producers to offer the Simpsons a movie deal

programme.desc: The BandBers are in Gateshead to visit the Sutherlands Hotel. Hugh and Loretta are in awe of the decor but Mia and Emmanuel are determined to dig up some dirt. There are surprising revelations over drinks in the evening before an impressive breakfast the next morning but the feedback leaves Heather and Paul with more questions than answers

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The third stay of the week is at Brampton Dales Farm in Gainsborough, Lincolnshire. The guests are unimpressed by some squeaky furniture but charmed by the furry welcome. Hugh and Loretta treat the BandBers to an afternoon out at an old jail, making the farm look like a palace in comparison

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The final visit of the week is to Valley View in Pendle, Lancashire, where sisters Sharon and Deby hope to get the BandBers onboard with the glamping experience. The spectacular views are universally admired, but the accommodation proves divisive, with Hugh comparing his glamping pod to a student flat

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The contestants meet one last time to discover how much they have been paid by their fellow hoteliers and to air their grievances. Mia and Emmanuel from the Mayfield Hotel want to clean up Heather and Pauls cleanliness comments, before they find themselves under the microscope for the exact same reason. Hugh and Loretta are keen to throw back the covers on Sharons sleep worries, before Sharon and her sister Deby reveal they didnt take too kindly to their digs being compared to a student flat

programme.title: Kirstie and Phils Love It or List It
programme.desc: Kirstie Allsopp and Phil Spencer help Ruth and Ken from Caterham, Surrey settle their debate over their three-storey town house. Since their children have flown the nest, the home isnt right for them anymore and Ruth is ready to sell but avid DIYer Ken wants to stay and thinks with some touch ups their home could still be the place for them

programme.title: Channel 4 News
programme.desc: Including sport and weather

programme.title: Transformers: Rise of the Beasts (2023)
programme.desc: In 1994 New York City, an ex-serviceman accepts a job to steal a sports car. The high-end vehicle turns out to be a robot in disguise, who propels him into the midst of a hunt for a precious Transwarp key. The device will allow Autobot leader Optimus Prime and his mechanised compatriots to return home to Cybertron. Fantasy prequel, starring Anthony Ramos and Dominique Fishback

programme.title: Jumanji: Welcome to the Jungle (2017)
programme.desc: Four teenagers play a jungle-themed game on an old console, only to find themselves transported into the game and transformed into its heroic characters. They must embark on a death-defying journey through the games wilderness setting to make it back to the real world, or be stuck as video game characters forever. Fantasy action comedy, starring Dwayne Johnson, Karen Gillan, Kevin Hart and Jack Black

programme.title: No Hard Feelings (2023)
programme.desc: Faced with the possibility of losing her mothers house, a woman called Maddie answers an advert from a married couple, who are offering a Buick Regal car to anyone willing to date their introverted 19-year-old son Percy before he attends college. Maddie promises to bring the teenager out of his shell. Comedy, starring Jennifer Lawrence and Andrew Barth Feldman

programme.title: Our Ladies (2019)
programme.desc: In 1990s Scotland, a group of Catholic school girls get an opportunity to go into Edinburgh for a choir competition, but theyre more interested in drinking, partying and hooking up than winning the competition. Comedy drama, starring Abigail Lawrie, Rona Morison and Marli Siu

programme.title: Ramsays Hotel Hell
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay visits the allegedly haunted Cambridge Hotel in New York, run by former military man John Imhof and his wife Tina. John runs the business like a dictatorship - an approach that is upsetting staff and sending guests straight for the exits. Will the chef be able to use his experience in the restaurant business to save this struggling establishment from disaster?

programme.title: Couples Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Three Birmingham couples compete to host the best dinner party and win a cash prize. Amanda and her husband Anthony kick off the competition with an ambitious menu, before its the turn of festival lover Oli and his girlfriend LC, who prepare a vegetarian menu for their guests. However, their evening is tainted by Anthony, who upsets several of the guests with an untoward remark. Civil partners Steve and Sean try to put the weeks tension behind them as they focus on winning the cash prize

programme.title: George Clarkes Old House, New Home
programme.desc: The architect explores an arts and crafts-inspired house in Surrey. Built in the 1920s, it has tall chimneys, leaded windows, gabled ends and a steeply pitched roof. Sadly, it has Artex everywhere and incorporates some dubious design alterations. He sets out to help its owners turn it back into an elegant home for themselves and their three children. George also tackles a suburban home that has so many layers of wallpaper that peeling them back is like going back through a time warp

programme.title: Devon and Cornwall
programme.desc: Compilation of highlights from previous series. High up on Dartmoor, shepherds Steve and Crispin Alford ride their horses out to gather their sheep for a speed shearing competition. In Looe, on the south coast of Cornwall, the whole community is gearing up for one of the biggest events of the year - the one-mile wild swim from St Georges Island back to the town beach

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: A tornado hits Springfield and Marge and Homer have a brush with death that prompts them to think about who would look after their kids if the worst were to happen. But finding suitable guardians for their brood is no easy feat - until they bump into super-cool couple Mav and Portia. Hes a surfer and shes an environmental lawyer - but are they just too good to be true?

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.sub-title: The Day the Earth Stood Cool
programme.desc: Homer shakes off the shackles of his traditional lifestyle after hitting it off with his trendy new neighbours, who are the ultimate in cool - although Marge isnt too keen on the hipster clan, especially their parenting style. However, when Bart falls out with one of his new friends kids, the doughnut-loving dad soon sees them for what they really are. With the guest voices of Portlandia stars Fred Armisen and Carrie Brownstein, and Patton Oswalt (Young Adult)

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Homer doesnt seem to care when Santas Little Helper goes missing, puzzling the rest of his family who are all panicking about their missing pooch. So Grampa shares a story about his son, a certain childhood pet and a more youthful but no-less-bitter Mr Burns

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: A trip to an amusement park ends in disarray, prompting Homer to question the behaviour of his fellow man - and leading to an invitation for him to join a survivalist group preparing for the end of the world. As usual, its left to Marge to talk some sense into her hubby. Featuring the guest voice of music legend Tom Waits

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Springfield Elementary is threatened with closure over poor test scores, until it is revealed that one student missed the exam and could potentially save the school with an above-average mark. Unfortunately, that pupil turns out to be Bart - can he pull it out of the bag?

programme.title: The King of Queens
programme.desc: The couple decide to be charitable and donate funds to Deacons school library - but Carrie is more concerned with looking generous than actually helping people. Leah Remini stars

programme.title: The King of Queens
programme.desc: Doug and Deacon take $100 from the emergency fund to place a bet on a boxing match. But when they win $5,000, they have to spend it all in one day to stop Carrie finding out about the theft. Kevin James stars

programme.title: The King of Queens
programme.desc: Doug discovers Carrie used to have a crush on his dentist - who he is convinced is deliberately making his root canal operation as painful as possible. Comedy, starring Kevin James

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Ray and Robert both want to keep a stray bulldog that Ray brings home. It reminds Ray of a dog he had to give up as a child, but it turns out that the cute canine is not so stray after all. Comedy, starring Ray Romano

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: The neighbours are upset by the antics of Rays parents and gather at his house to thrash out a solution, but their meeting is gatecrashed by the troublesome pair

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: A psychotherapist arrives to interview Debra for a book on the American family, but finds the rest of the household far more captivating, leaving the humble housewife feeling left out

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: The Seattle shrink celebrates his 2,000th radio broadcast and is disappointed to find he has a recording of every show but one, forcing him to turn to an obsessive fan for a copy of the elusive tape. Guest starring computer tycoon Bill Gates

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: Niles and Frasier befriend Kirby, whose girlfriends grandfather is a well-known wine connoisseur. Martin is forced to wear a device to monitor his blood pressure. Comedy, starring Kelsey Grammer and David Hyde Pierce

programme.desc: Tim Lovejoy and Simon Rimmer are joined by guests Felicity Montagu, Fra Fee, Francis Bourgeois, and Leigh and Jill Francis. With music by Jordan Rakei

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: A dare lands Bart in hospital and he makes up a story that he went to Heaven and met Jesus, prompting Christian film producers to offer the Simpsons a movie deal

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Barts dream girl Mary Spuckler comes to town, but their relationship turns sour when he fails to pay her enough attention. Meanwhile, Homer lands himself in the doghouse after upsetting Marge once too often. With the guest voices of Benedict Cumberbatch and Zooey Deschanel

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Bart and Milhouse sample the perks of adulthood when a shaving experiment leaves one of the boys looking exactly like his father. Meanwhile, a preoccupied Marge tries to protect Maggie from the dangers of childrens TV

programme.title: George Clarkes Amazing Spaces
programme.sub-title: Circus Wagon, Tree Hotel and Camping Pod
programme.desc: The architect meets master craftsman Paul, who has muscular dystrophy and is saving a Victorian circus wagon. George also finds out about a grain store being re-imagined as a festival bar, discovers a small hotel disguised as a tree and a camping pod that looks like a giant conker

programme.title: Hamleys: Top 100 Toys of All Time
programme.desc: A celebration of the greatest toys of all time, as Jonathan Ross and daughter Honey, Alison Hammond and son Aidan and comedians and best friends Lou Sanders and Harriet Kemsley are given after-hours permission to run wild in the world-famous Hamleys toy shop on Regent Street to get their hands on the playthings they loved and longed for as children. The list features everything from Lego and Hungry Hippos to the pogo stick, Operation and the infamous clackers

He auditions to play piano at a popular jazz club as part of a quartet led by Dorothea Williams. On his way home from impressing Dorothea, Joe tumbles down an open manhole and lingers in limbo between life and death. Animated fantasy, with the voices of Jamie Foxx and Tina Fey

programme.title: Channel 4 News
programme.desc: Including sport and weather

programme.desc: Behind the scenes as one of the UKs busiest theme parks, meeting the army of designers, engineers and entertainers are working flat out to keep customers happy. From building a new entrance portal to rehearsing a high-octane stunt show just days before opening, the pressure is on. With only one place available at the grand final at Londons Hackney Empire, Sam and Paloma face an impossible choice

programme.title: Friends

programme.title: Friends

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One with the Dozen Lasagnes

programme.title: Friends

programme.sub-title: The One with Two Parts - Part One

programme.title: Luca (2021)

The duo strike up a friendship with a local girl, and risk their secret being exposed as they help her to compete in an annual sporting event. Pixar animated adventure, with the voices of Jacob Tremblay and Jack Dylan Grazer

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Krustys ancient jokes and politically incorrect impressions go down like a lead balloon at a charity comedy festival - so he decides to spice up his act by adding more alternative, adult-oriented material. Featuring the guest voice of chat show host Jay Leno, alongside comedians Steven Wright and Janeane Garofalo

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Moe desperately wants to raise cash to lavish on his new girlfriend, so Homer rashly agrees to help him defraud his car insurance company - but his bumbling attempts to destroy the vehicle put him behind bars. Featuring the guest voice of Helen Hunt

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Apu has the bright idea of turning the Kwik-E-Mart into a novel money-spinning tourist attraction, while Lisa is struck by the awful thought that her genetic make-up means she will follow in her familys footsteps and end up stupid

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Homer takes Ned Flanders advice and starts praying regularly, hoping God will lend a sympathetic ear and make it possible for him to buy a better home. programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: A tax audit leads Homer into big trouble, leaving him with no choice but to make amends by helping the government nail Mr Burns for the theft of a trillion-dollar banknote

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Homer acquires a pet monkey to help him with his chores, while Bart begins co-hosting a childrens news programme with Lisa - and decides to take a leaf out of Kent Brockmans book, cynically concentrating on human interest stories in a bid to boost his own popularity

programme.title: The Amazing Race Australia
programme.desc: After a virtual pit stop in Langkawi in Malaysia, the race continues as the celeb teams push on without a break. Crabbiness creeps in as the teams must catch and sell crabs. programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Homer leads a rebellion of loser dads against the friendship between Bart and a child who is famous influencer

programme.title: The Simpsons

programme.desc: Aspiring singer Lek and footballer boyfriend Josh kick off the series of dinner parties in Aberdeen, aiming to impress their guests with an Asian/West Indian fusion menu. One-time ravers Jason and Jennifer host the final evening, hoping their travel-inspired menu and surprising revelations will help them secure the cash prize

programme.title: Couples Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Newlyweds Jen and Callum kick off the dinner party challenge in Aberdeen with an American-themed menu, while Debbie and her husband Shaun opt for Scottish-inspired dishes on the second night. Day three sees Sam and her boyfriend Jamie host, with each of the couples divulging their pet names for one another, before the winner of the £1,000 cash prize is revealed at the end of the night

programme.title: Dont Tell the Bride
programme.desc: Romantic groom David plans a hot air balloon wedding for his feisty bride Elle, who he is also personally designing a dress for, but faces difficulties from the weather and trying to please eight bridesmaids

programme.title: Dont Tell the Bride
programme.desc: Groom-to-be James is given £12,000 to plan every detail of his nuptials and give his fiancee Hollie the wedding of her dreams, while the bride relinquishes control of the big day in the presence of a lawyer

programme.title: Dont Tell the Bride
programme.desc: Groom Mark plans a West Country farm-themed shindig - complete with pig racing, a Wurzels tribute act and a tractor for transport - for his elegant bride-to-be Alex, who is hoping for a wedding inspired by Downton Abbey

programme.title: Dont Tell the Bride
programme.desc: Thrill-seeker Craig plans an adrenaline-fuelled wedding for his country bride-to-be Ellie, complete with a sky-diving entrance and a bungee-jumping ceremony. However, her ideal day consists of a traditional service in their local village church

programme.title: Dont Tell the Bride
programme.desc: Former drama student Jack hopes to impress his husband-to-be James with a Shakespeare-themed wedding - with a performance complete with a cast of actors and a pair of donkeys - despite his partners hopes for a more traditional big day

programme.desc: Andy Wirth - the CEO of a California ski resort - goes undercover to learn more about his companys working practices as he prepares to merge an existing operation with a new acquisition

programme.desc: Andy Wiederhorn, CEO of Los Angeles-based fast food restaurant Fatburger, goes incognito among his employees in order to learn more about his business that has evolved from a late-night hangout for musicians in the 1950s to an international success story

programme.title: Ramsays Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay visits PJs Steakhouse in Queens, New York, to provide his expert advice to the owners. They decided to turn a successful bar into a high-end restaurant, but without any previous experience in managing a business they found themselves seriously in debt. With an over-confident chef and a partner propping up the bar, co-owner Madalyn faces a few difficult decisions

programme.title: Ramsays Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay heads to Florida to help the owners of Fleming, a Danish restaurant in Miami. A husband-and-wife duo bought the business eight years ago in the hope of continuing the places success, but started losing money rapidly. With a Cuban chef cooking Nordic cuisine and a filthy kitchen, things go from bad to worse until it all comes to a head on relaunch night

programme.title: Ramsays Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay visits Sushi Ko, a Japanese restaurant in California that is losing up to $20,000 a month. Gordon finds owner and chef Akira lacking in confidence and self-esteem as the strain of an empty business is beginning to take its toll on his relationship with this family

programme.title: Ramsays Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay visits California, where his job is to help the owner of Lido Di Manhattan. Lisa Marie Hemmat, an ambitious business school graduate, has been running the restaurant for the past five years, but has failed to exert any control over the kitchen and the menu. The chef tries to teach her the basics of cooking and venue management, but trouble brews when her staff threaten to walk out on relaunch night

programme.title: Ramsays Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay heads to Boca Raton in Florida to turn around the fortunes of Italian restaurant Anna Vincenzos. programme.title: Dont Tell the Bride
programme.desc: Groom-to-be Steve from Rotherham, South Yorkshire, is given £12,000 to plan every detail of his nuptials and give his fiancee the wedding of her dreams, while she relinquishes control of the big day. programme.title: Dont Tell the Bride

To add to his problems, he has a mother-in-law to impress - and he leaves everything to the last minute. Can he and party animal best man Tony get this party started? Or will it be a case of murder on the dance floor?

programme.title: Dont Tell the Bride
programme.desc: Countryside-loving Richard plans an ambitious mountain-top wedding blessing hundreds of miles away in Wales for his home-loving bride-to-be Jody. But when even his best man Kane needs convincing that the idea is a good one, it seems the groom has an uphill battle on his hands

programme.title: Undercover Boss USA
programme.desc: John Wilson, the President and Chief Operating Officer of Rollins Incorporated - the parent company of eight pest-control firms including flagship brand Orkin - goes undercover. He poses as a contestant on a reality TV competition who is trying to win money for his own business, and works alongside his employees to make sure the organisation is heading for another century of keeping homes rodent-free

programme.title: Undercover Boss USA
programme.desc: Randy DeWitt, the CEO and co-founder of bar and grill chain Twin Peaks, goes undercover to find out whether the companys culture is keeping up with its rapid growth. Posing as a contestant on a reality TV competition, he works among his own staff

programme.desc: In Notting Hill, West London, Queen and Shawn kick off the culinary competition with a menu inspired by their Thai and West Indian heritage, but well-travelled foodies Suzy and Paul are unimpressed. When one of the hosts reveals a dislike of West Londoners, the guests are left stunned, while day two sees Suzy and Paul prepare a French feast, but Shawn sees the evening as pretentious. Finally, fun-loving couple Charlotte and Kevin put together a trendy Japanese menu, before the winners of the £1,000 prize money are revealed

programme.title: Couples Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Three couples from the south coast of England compete for the £1,000 cash prize, with partners Lauren and Claire kicking off proceedings and hoping to impress with a menu of experimental flavour combinations. programme.title: Couples Come Dine with Me

On the second evening, Russell and Lisas pork dish and salmon main get raised eyebrows from their guests, although the food is not the only problem as animosity is brewing between two of the women. Tennis fans John and Suzy bring the week to a close - can they serve up an ace menu and walk away with the prize?

programme.title: Ramsays Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: The chef travels to Newbury Park in southern California to help Mexican restaurant Mama Ritas. programme.title: Ramsays Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay visits Le Bistro in Lighthouse Point, Florida, where the stubborn chef and owner has lost his passion for cooking. The visiting expert hopes to help, but his criticisms are not well received, causing tempers to flare

programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay revisits three restaurants he tried to save - Handlebar, Casa Roma and the Black Pearl - to find out whether his advice has been put to good use

programme.title: Ramsays Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay heads to New Jerseys Spanish Pavillion, which is run by two warring brothers whose staff spend more time using their mobile phones than working. The chef plans to turn the eaterys fortunes around, and starts by giving the dining room and menu a modern makeover

programme.title: Taskmaster Bleeped
programme.desc: No-naughty-bits version. The proposition put forth by the Taskmaster, Greg Davies, and his efficient assistant, Alex Horne, may not seem like a hugely enticing one: come to a strange house near a golf course, attempt a range of unusual and apparently pointless tasks and then have your performance picked apart by an angry man sitting on an imposing throne. And yet the lure of claiming the fabled Taskmaster trophy has attracted five more comics who have been selected to participate in the fun and games. They are: Amy Gledhill, Armando Iannucci, Joanna Page, Joel Dommett and Kumail Nanjiani. Like so many before them, they all believe that they can impress the Taskmaster. But only one will be immortalised as the 21st Taskmaster champion.In this first episode, Amy Gledhill, Armando Iannucci, Joanna Page, Joel Dommett and Kumail Nanjiani go hunting for a small creature, serve Greg his fruit and veggies and attempt to catch a golden T-shirt. But who will find all the oranges?

programme.desc: Beverlys first murder mystery party takes a surprising turn, and Erica struggles to pick a major

programme.title: First Dates
programme.desc: In a first for the restaurant, mum and daughter Maria and Charlotte arrive for a double date. Maria meets Steve, a divorced 46-year-old builder who has a saucy way with the ladies, while Charlotte is a single mum looking for a man to heal her broken heart. Thirty-year-old academic Dan is matched with cancer cell biologist Jemma from north London, and other diners include long-distance lorry driver Paul who meets Brummie rocker Rozie

programme.title: Gogglebox
programme.desc: The armchair critics judge Britains Got Talent - will it be a yes or now for the return of the hit talent show? They also share their thoughts on Baby Reindeer, Red Eye, Love Triangle, In with a Shout and The Yorkshire Vet, as well as an item about bras on This Morning and a news item on seagulls. From April 2024

programme.title: First Dates
programme.desc: Self-confessed ladette Lucy is on the hunt for the love of a good woman, having already met a male forensic investigator last year in the First Dates restaurant. Terry from east London, who has become comfortable living the single life, with his love for the horses and football leaving precious little time for romance, is in danger of blowing his chances with jeweller and widower Lisa when he goes into a bit too much detail about his solo interests

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Beverlys first murder mystery party takes a surprising turn, and Erica struggles to pick a major

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: After Pops falls asleep at the movies, Adam worries that his cool grandpa may finally be slowing down. Beverly drags Erica into a contract dispute with her cookbook publisher

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Mitchell learns a valuable life lesson when Murray, a former resident of the house, shows up unexpectedly. Meanwhile, the Dunphys old neighbour-turned-tech-titan Kenneth comes to visit with a big surprise for Phil, and Mannys dad Javier shows up with a big opportunity for his son

programme.title: Dont Tell the Bride
programme.desc: Thrill junkie Lee plans to push his unadventurous bride Aimee to the extreme with a wedding that would send most brides over the edge. While Aimee wanted to play it safe with a picturesque traditional event, Lee hopes shell take a leap of faith to be his wife

programme.title: Lego Masters Australia
programme.desc: Four Australian teams take on four international teams whove previously competed in their own countries - the USA, Denmark, Germany and France. Hamish Blake hosts, while Ryan Brickman McNaught mentors and guides the contestants. In the first challenge, they have 14 hours to build a creation that looks cool while smashing through an ice field, and thats strong enough to withstand breaking through the ice

programme.title: The Amazing Race Australia
programme.desc: After an overnight flight, the remaining racers arrive in Langkawi, off the west coast of Malaysia. Its an island paradise, but it tests the teams physically and mentally. First, they must either take to the skies in search of an eagle or deliver a tray of cocktails via a stand-up paddleboard. A challenge to replicate fruit baskets for local resorts levels the playing field and a wrong turn sends a fan-favourite team packing

programme.title: Patrick (2018)
programme.desc: A young womans chaotic life becomes more complicated when she inherits her grandmothers dog. Comedy, starring Beattie Edmondson, Ed Skrein, Jennifer Saunders and Cherie Lunghi

programme.title: Made in Chelsea
programme.desc: After finding himself in another love triangle, Kit wants answers, but Jazz and Inga arent even sure what those answers are. The two newest power couples in Chelsea, Zeyno and Arman, and Elys and Freddy, go on a double date. Also, the sibling rivalry heats up - Jules older brother Philip has opened his mouth one too many times and landed her in hot water

programme.title: Married at First Sight Australia
programme.desc: Its time for the third Commitment Ceremony, but with couples in crisis and dinner party tensions still simmering, emotions erupt cataclysmically as two marriages come to an end

programme.title: Married at First Sight Australia
programme.desc: Friends and Family Week exposes insecurities and deepens divides, with one bride feeling ambushed by her grooms mates - and a reminder of his ex makes things even worse

programme.title: The Great Celebrity Bake Off for Stand Up to Cancer
programme.desc: Hosts Noel Fielding and Alison Hammond and judges Cherish Finden and Paul Hollywood are joined in the tent by Alex Brooker, Ambika Mod, Rose Ayling-Ellis, Vicky Pattison and Sam Thompson. The celebrity bakers must make mini rolls and syrup sponge puddings, and recreate the most iconic outfits theyve ever worn in choux form

programme.title: Toy Story 3 (2010)
programme.desc: Woody, Buzz and the other toys accidentally end up in a daycare centre when their owner grows up. At first this seems like the perfect new home for them, but when they realise the dangers lurking under the surface, they begin to formulate an escape plan. Pixar animated adventure sequel, with the voices of Tom Hanks, Tim Allen, Joan Cusack, Michael Keaton and Ned Beatty

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: The family is recruited and brainwashed by a religious cult - except for Marge, who resorts to desperate measures to snap the others out of it

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Bart and Lisa go on a school trip, but Otto accidentally drives the bus off a bridge and into the water, where it washes up on a deserted island - leaving the schoolchildren to fend for themselves. Meanwhile, Homer decides to set up his own internet business. With the guest voice of James Earl Jones

programme.title: Men in Black: International (2019)
programme.desc: The intergalactic law enforcers have always protected the Earth from the scum of the universe. This time they tackle their biggest threat - a mole in the Men in Black organisation. Director F Gary Grays fantasy sequel, starring Chris Hemsworth, Tessa Thompson and Rebecca Ferguson

programme.title: Celebrity Gogglebox
programme.desc: Some of Britains best-loved personalities turn their hand to being the countrys most opinionated viewers in this look back over the standout moments from series six. Programmes under consideration include Bridgerton, MILF Manor, George Clarkes Amazing Spaces, In with a Shout, Americas Sweethearts: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders, The UnXplained: Mysteries of the Universe, and coverage of the Glastonbury Festival and Donald Trumps victory in the 2024 US presidential election

programme.title: Gogglebox
programme.desc: The armchair critics share their opinions on shows including Celebrity Bear Hunt, The Apprentice and Go Back to Where You Came From? Celebrity Special, Supermarket Own Brands: The Big Taste Test and a Channel 5 News report on the threat of an asteroid strike on Earth

programme.desc: The armchair critics share their opinions on shows including Sitting on a Fortune, Casualty, Britains Got Talent, MerPeople, James May: Oh Cook!, The Greatest Auction and Top of the Pops 1994. Plus, reflections on the stories making the ITV News

programme.title: First Dates
programme.desc: The latest diners looking for love are retired labourer Ted, whos 69. He lost his wife Carol in 2013 after 40 years of marriage. He meets 67-year-old retired legal secretary Marian, whos been married four times but hasnt given up on love. Also dining are Fran, 47, who meets 46-year-old builder and part-time erotic thriller writer Colin. Plus, part-time model Linford, 25, meets 29-year-old advertising sales manager Xanthi from London, and coffee shop manager Oliver hopes for romance with personal assistant Loren

programme.title: Ramsays Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: The chef heads to family owned Italian restaurant Giuseppis in Macomb Township, Michigan. Father and son Joe and Sam Borgias constant fighting is driving customers away, and Gordon discovers one of the restaurateurs is concealing a serious health problem. Nevertheless, he sets about rescuing them from disaster and turning around the failing business

programme.title: Ramsays Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay comes to the aid of a restaurant in Mount Sinai, New York, which appears to be stuck in the 1980s. The crumbling decor and unenthusiastic head chef at the Handlebar need to be tackled, but owners Bill and Carolyn LeRoy are in denial about the problems they face

programme.title: Hollyoaks Omnibus
programme.desc: Its a familys worst nightmare when two children are taken, Charlie shares some good news with Vicky, and things come to a head in a face-off between two mothers. Diane puts on a brave face for her family as she begins chemotherapy, but back at home, Tony is pushed to his limits. Also, sparks fly for two villagers and suspicion arises when a resident disappears

programme.title: Wonder Park (2019)
programme.desc: June, a science-loving little girl, and her mother spend hours playing with stuffed animals and other toys, fashioning a world of imagination connected to a fabulous theme park. When Junes mom is diagnosed with a life-threatening illness and has to go away for treatment, June finds a real version of her theme park. Animated family adventure, with the voices of Mila Kunis, Jennifer Garner and Kenan Thompson

programme.title: Ramsays Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: The chef heads to Italian family restaurant Sabatiellos in Stamford, Connecticut, where the owners fiery temper upsets the staff and has left him more than $1million in debt. Gordons help is urgently needed to get customers back through the door, but the restaurateur does not take kindly to criticism and closes the restaurant down when his employees turn on him

programme.title: Ramsays Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: The fiery chef comes to the aid of Anthony Trobiano, whose restaurant in Great Neck, New York, is failing even though his partners parents have given him their life savings and he has taken out half a million dollars in loans. Gordon has some harsh criticism about the unhygienic kitchen and the quality of the food being served, but the owner has trouble accepting his advice

programme.title: Married at First Sight Australia
programme.desc: Outside opinions and rising tensions are rife as Family and Friends Week continues. And new information comes to light that threatens the future of several couples

programme.title: Married at First Sight Australia
programme.desc: At the fourth dinner party, one bride is determined to avoid any drama. Alas, a groom has heard some rumours and needs to confront her

programme.title: Luca (2021)
programme.desc: Two sea monsters fascinated with life above water disguise themselves as human boys so they can explore a town on the Italian Riviera. programme.title: Barefoot Contessa - Back to Basics
programme.desc: Ina Garten cooks at two restaurants in the city, and learns the secret to an oyster pan roast

programme.title: Barefoot Contessa - Back to Basics
programme.desc: Ina Garten and Giada De Laurentiis prepare a lobster and potato salad lunch, along with mascarpone and lemon gnocchi with thyme butter sauce

programme.title: Barefoot Contessa - Back to Basics
programme.desc: Ina Garten prepares a towering chocolate birthday cake with Tyler Florence, and the duo visit the local farming scene to buy some chicken and vegetables

programme.title: Barefoot Contessa - Back to Basics
programme.desc: The American chef is joined by Michael Symon and the duo prepare a Greek menu including smoked pork ribs, tzatziki and spicy houmous

programme.title: Barefoot Contessa - Back to Basics
programme.desc: Ina Garten prepares a chocolate-themed menu including cupcakes with a peanut butter frosting, chocolate gelato, a chocolate orange fondue and white chocolate truffles

programme.title: Jamie Oliver: Cooking for Less
programme.desc: With the rising cost of food and energy, Jamie Oliver is on a mission to make delicious dishes that wont break the budget

programme.title: Jamies Comfort Food
programme.desc: Jamie Oliver gives more of the nations favourite dishes a twist, continuing with lasagne with roasted duck, the ultimate bacon sandwich and, from rural Mexico, huevos rancheros - cooked eggs with a spicy tomato salsa, black beans, avocado and a soft tortilla

programme.title: Jamies Comfort Food
programme.desc: Over the past seven editions, Jamie Oliver has given some of the nations favourite dishes a twist, reinventing British classics like shepherds pie, rustling up outdoor treats and transforming old-school desserts such as pavlova and sticky-toffee pudding. For his final menu, he makes fish and chips with an India Pale Ale batter, a treat for vegetarians with his version of the Indonesian salad gado gado, and a speedy crab linguine

programme.title: James Martins Islands to Highlands
programme.desc: James is joined by Michelin-starred chef Gareth Ward for a tour of Mid Wales. They begin at a cider-tasting, which James uses to dish up some cider-infused apple fritters. Gareth discovers a farm where the Wagyu cattle fed on local beer. Away from the culinary activities, Gareth is challenged to a rally car ride and James demonstrates his dog training prowess with his trusty hound Cooper

programme.title: James Martins Islands to Highlands
programme.desc: In Englands first National Park, the Peak District, James is joined by restaurateur Tessa Bramley, who serves him a beef fillet alongside vegetables from her own garden. He also takes part in an unusual contest - hen racing - where he challenges a local lad and world champion to a race. After discovering some award-winning gin, James meets a local forager and samples some of his elderflower wine. Finally, he uses some of the foraged elderflowers to make a delicious dessert

programme.title: The Hairy Bikers Go Local
programme.desc: Dave Myers and Si King visit a Scottish-Malaysian fusion street food cafe called Kopitiam in Glasgow, where they meet owner Julie, who is on the lookout for fresh and exciting local produce that she can put her own unique and spicy twist on. The duo head off in search of three new suppliers, and get their hands on exciting ingredients including shellfish, venison and some very special salt

programme.title: The Hairy Bikers Go Local
programme.desc: Dave Myers and Si King visit the Cotswolds, and travel to the village of Upper Slaughter to meet chef Charles Smith, who runs two restaurants at Lords of the Manor. He is keen to bring modern cutting-edge cuisine to this historic country house hotel. After sampling dishes from the 10-course tasting menu, the duo learn that Charles sources his ingredients from all over the country. So, theyre determined to find three new local suppliers who could provide equally top-quality ingredients

programme.title: The Hairy Bikers Go Local
programme.desc: Dave Myers and Si King explore Fife, on Scotlands east coast, and visit the Harbour Cafe. Amy is the chef who runs this place alongside husband Jack. The couple insist on using only local, seasonal produce, and fish fresh from the sea just yards from their front door. In April, they literally build the place up, and as the summer season ends, they take it down again. As the building is a temporary structure, theres no mains power, so Amy relies on a charcoal oven

programme.title: The Hairy Bikers Go Local
programme.desc: Dave Myers and Si King are in the Norfolk village of East Barsham, hunting for local produce for creative country pub chef Jake, to help him keep the menu fresh for his 40-seat restaurant. Heading off, they find Norfolk geese at a local farm, a company that makes its own version of versatile vegetarian ingredient Tofu and a family-owned plum orchard. But will Jake be impressed by the Bikers suggestions?

programme.title: Man v Food

programme.title: Man v Food
programme.desc: Adam Richman visits Baltimore, Maryland, to eat flame-grilled beef sliced thin and piled high

programme.title: Man v Food
programme.desc: Adam Richman takes on his next challenge in Seattle, where he tries to eat a 5lb omelette made with 12 eggs

programme.title: Man v Food
programme.desc: Adam Richman heads to the Broken Yolk restaurant in San Diego, where he tackles an enormous omelette in the Ironman Challenge

programme.title: Man v Food
programme.desc: Adam Richman combines his love of food and baseball, visiting three minor league stadiums renowned for their tasty cuisine

programme.title: Man v Food
programme.desc: Adam Richman continues his challenge in Little Rock, Arkansas, where he tries to consume a fiery pulled pork sandwich

programme.title: Man v Food
programme.desc: Adam Richman tries to consume a milkshake weighing just over 7lb and a 24oz sandwich in an hour in Washington, DC

programme.title: James Martins Islands to Highlands
programme.desc: The chef is joined by Brian Turner to explore the culinary delights of his native Yorkshire, with James visiting Frances Atkins restaurant The Yorke Arms, where he enjoys her signature dish al fresco in her unusual dining room the Onion. Brian tastes the delights of some local charcuterie and is challenged to some off-road driving, while James brushes up his clay-pigeon shooting skills

programme.title: James Martins Islands to Highlands
programme.desc: James is joined by Clare Smyth for a tour of the Lake District. They visit the Windermere Jetty Museum and take a trip on the lake in a traditional steam-powered boat. They also visit the farmers who supply the meat for Clares restaurant and discover the secrets behind the regions famous sticky toffee pudding

programme.title: The Great British Bake Off
programme.desc: Noel Fielding and Matt Lucas present the semi-final in which the amateurs face a trio of patisserie challenges, including a delicate layered slice signature and a regional French classic in the technical. On day two, they must use all their skill and creativity as they serve up a showstopping entremets display. But who will be going through to the final three? Only Paul Hollywood and Prue Leith know the answer

programme.title: The Great British Bake Off
programme.desc: They came, they saw, they baked - and along the way nine of them were eliminated from the competition. Now only three amateur bakers remain to compete in the final. All they need to do to impress Paul Hollywood and Prue Leith is produce a carrot cake worthy of winning, come out tops in a technical based on a Belgian recipe and rustle up a showstopping banquet fit for the Mad Hatters Tea Party. Everything is still to play for - and Noel Fielding and Matt Lucas are on hand to lighten the atmosphere if it all gets too tense

programme.title: The Great British Bake Off
programme.desc: Its cake week, and the brand-new batch of bakers tackle mini cakes, a striking sponge and a scaled-down version of a home close to their hearts.

programme.title: The Great British Bake Off
programme.desc: The bakers tackle illusion macarons and a fruity favourite, before unleashing their creativity by making a dramatic 3D mask entirely from biscuits.

programme.title: Adam Richman Eats Britain
programme.desc: Adam samples the famous Eton Mess in Eton. He also enjoys afternoon tea fit for a Royal in Windsor, samples venison in bon-bon bar snacks and makes some tasty fudge

programme.title: Adam Richman Eats Britain
programme.desc: In Wales, Adam tries Glamorgan sausage in Glamorgan. He enjoys Welsh rarebit and wonderful Welsh cakes, and bites into his Polish heritage with pierogis

programme.title: Jamies Comfort Food
programme.desc: Jamie Oliver gives more of the nations favourite dishes a twist, continuing with lasagne with roasted duck, the ultimate bacon sandwich and, from rural Mexico, huevos rancheros - cooked eggs with a spicy tomato salsa, black beans, avocado and a soft tortilla

programme.title: Jamies Comfort Food
programme.desc: Over the past seven editions, Jamie Oliver has given some of the nations favourite dishes a twist, reinventing British classics like shepherds pie, rustling up outdoor treats and transforming old-school desserts such as pavlova and sticky-toffee pudding. For his final menu, he makes fish and chips with an India Pale Ale batter, a treat for vegetarians with his version of the Indonesian salad gado gado, and a speedy crab linguine

programme.title: James Martins Islands to Highlands
programme.desc: In Northern Ireland, James and local boy Paul Rankin brave the Carrick-a-Rede rope bridge together, then James cooks a tasty fish dish with the dramatic coastline as his backdrop
