programme.desc: At Northumberlands Chillingham Castle, Sir Humphrey Wakefield prepares to hand over the estate to his apprehensive son Maximilian. Hard-working staff at Carlton Towers in North Yorkshire get ready for the arrival of 120 caravan owners for the annual rally and dinner dance

programme.title: Urban Secrets
programme.desc: Alan Cumming explores the history of Bristol, beginning by learning a grisly secret at the docks before meeting Mercury Prize-winning musician Roni Size to discuss life in the St Pauls and Stokes Croft areas of the city. He also explores the district of Clifton and visits a speakeasy-style bar

programme.title: Urban Secrets
programme.desc: Alan Cumming visits Liverpool, cutting through cliches about football and the Beatles to explore its less-celebrated treasures. Among his destinations are a 1930s banking building that has remained unaltered since closing in 2007, a well-appointed set of toilets and a recording studio hidden in a bar. He also discovers which former dictator once spent Christmas in the city

programme.title: Billions
programme.desc: Axe disappears, leaving Axe Capital in temporary chaos, while Chuck uncovers some damning evidence against Axe and makes a surprising arrest. Drama, Paul Giamatti stars

programme.title: Billions
programme.desc: Axe works on his defence against the public attack on his company, leaving Wendy caught in the middle between him and her husband, Chuck. Drama, Paul Giamatti and Damian Lewis star

programme.title: Billions
programme.desc: As the drama continues, a member of Axes inner circle turns into an informant. Starring Paul Giamatti and Damian Lewis

programme.title: Billions
programme.desc: Axe receives a tip about a mole inside his company, throwing the US Attorneys case into jeopardy. Later, a secret from his past surfaces. Paul Giamatti and Damian Lewis star

programme.title: Billions
programme.desc: A sudden and mysterious disappearance sends both Axe and Chuck spinning, before Connerty, Chuck and the FBI go on a manhunt

programme.title: Deadwood
programme.desc: The trial of Jack McCall continues as the jury retire to mull over the evidence they have heard. Elsewhere, the townsfolk lay the outlaw Wild Bill to rest, and Bullock decides to take the law into his own hands

programme.title: Deadwood
programme.desc: The smallpox virus threatens the very existence of the inhabitants of Deadwood, as it engulfs the entire town and leaves no one well enough to go and get any medicine. Meanwhile, Swearengen is still after Almas gold claim

programme.title: Deadwood
programme.desc: Two teenagers come to town with a tale that theyre in search of their runaway father, but when they see the two rival saloons the dollar signs ring up in their eyes and they decide to split up and each take a job at separate establishments. Meanwhile, tensions rise when Bullock returns with a fresh ultimatum for Swearengen

programme.title: House of the Dragon
programme.desc: Daemon visits his wife in the Vale, while Viserys and Rhaenyra broker agreements with the Velaryons, and Alicent seeks the truth about the princess

programme.title: House of the Dragon
programme.desc: Now a decade older, Rhaenyra navigates continued speculation about her children, while Daemon and Laena consider an offer from Pentos. Paddy Considine and Matt Smith star

programme.title: House of the Dragon
programme.desc: As the families descend on Driftmark for a funeral, King Viserys calls for an end to infighting between members of the Great Houses. Paddy Considine and Matt Smith star

programme.title: House of the Dragon
programme.desc: Six years later, the succession plans for Driftmark become critical, and Rhaenyra tries to strike a bargain with Rhaenys

programme.title: All Her Fault
programme.desc: The Irvines struggle to adjust to their new normal, while also recovering from the fallout of their arguments. As Marissa tries to cope with past events, Jenny deals with domestic pressures of her own and uncovers some of Richies secrets

programme.title: DTF St Louis
programme.desc: Floyds ego takes a hit after a failed attempt to reconnect with Carol, leading Clark to help his friend using the DTF app. Black comedy, starring David Harbour

programme.title: The Trip (2010)
programme.desc: Steve Coogan is commissioned to review half a dozen restaurants for a Sunday newspaper and plans the trip with his American girlfriend - only to face the prospect of a week of meals-for-one after she dumps him. So Steve calls old friend Rob Brydon to accompany him, and the pair find themselves debating the big questions of life over a series of delightful dishes. Improvised comedy in which the stars play versions of themselves, directed by Michael Winterbottom

programme.title: House of the Dragon
programme.desc: While Alicent enlists help to track down Aegon, members of the Great Houses of Westeros are asked to affirm their allegiance

programme.title: DTF St Louis
programme.sub-title: No Ones Normal. It Just Looks That Way from Across the Street
programme.desc: With Tiger Tiger out of the picture, Clark proposes a new plan, while Plumb and Homer are forced to question everything they thought they knew about the case after a series of revelations

programme.title: Euphoria
programme.desc: The return of the drama following young people navigating the worlds of social networks, sex and drugs, Starring Zendaya, Jacob Elordi and Sydney Sweeney

programme.title: Homicide: Life on the Street
programme.desc: Bayliss and Pembleton check out the death of a police dog. Howard tracks down a drug dealer who is wanted for murder and Bolander meets Carols son. Gritty police drama, guest starring Edie Falco, with Daniel Baldwin and Andre Braugher

programme.title: Homicide: Life on the Street
programme.desc: Lewis and Crosetti investigate the murder of a Chinese political refugee, and suspect he may have been killed because of his involvement in the Tiananmen Square protests. Police drama, starring Daniel Baldwin, Ned Beatty and Richard Belzer

programme.title: Venom (2018)
programme.desc: While exploring space for new worlds, a probe belonging to the Life Foundation discovers a comet covered in symbiotic lifeforms. Following the probes return to Earth, journalist Eddie Brock investigates sinister trials being carried out by the corporation, and after being infected by an alien symbiote, develops superhuman strength and power. Fantasy adventure, starring Tom Hardy and Riz Ahmed

programme.title: Bookworm (2024)
programme.desc: Mildred, an 11-year-old girl, finds her world turned upside down when her estranged father, a washed-up magician, takes her on a wild adventure. Family comedy, starring Elijah Wood and Nell Fisher

programme.title: Spy Kids 3-D: Game Over (2003)
programme.desc: Young agent Juni has to go it alone when his big sister Carmen is kidnapped by the evil Toymaker, forcing the plucky junior spy to infiltrate the villains virtual reality world to rescue her. Adventure sequel, starring Daryl Sabara, Alexa Vega, Sylvester Stallone, Antonio Banderas, Ricardo Montalban, George Clooney, Steve Buscemi, Salma Hayek and Elijah Wood

programme.title: Peter Pan (2003)
programme.desc: The adventures of the boy who never grows old, as he whisks Wendy Darling and her brothers away to the magical world of Neverland - where they come face to face with fearsome Captain Hook. Adaptation of JM Barries fantasy novel, starring Jeremy Sumpter, Rachel Hurd-Wood, Jason Isaacs and Lynn Redgrave

programme.title: The Hobbit: An Unexpected Journey (2012)
programme.desc: Unassuming hobbit Bilbo Baggins is pulled out of his comfortable life when Gandalf the wizard volunteers him for a dangerous quest. He joins a party of dwarves who are on a mission to reclaim their lost homeland, which has been taken over by a dragon. When the group journeys into the Misty Mountains, Bilbo becomes separated from the dwarves and falls into a cave, where he finds himself confronted by Gollum and forced to play a riddle game. It is set in Middle-earth 60 years before the events of The Lord of the Rings and is the first part of Peter Jacksons fantasy adventure trilogy based on JRR Tolkiens novel, starring Martin Freeman, Ian McKellen, Richard Armitage, James Nesbitt, Ken Stott, Cate Blanchett, Ian Holm and Christopher Lee

programme.title: The Hobbit: The Desolation of Smaug (2013)
programme.desc: The party of dwarves and their hobbit ally continue the quest to reclaim their lost kingdom, journeying through the forest home of ancestral enemy the elves and finally facing the dragon that drove them from their home. Meanwhile, Gandalf the wizard investigates the rise of Necromancer, a mysterious dark power residing in Dol Guldur with the ability to summon the spirits of the dead. Part two of Peter Jacksons fantasy adventure trilogy based on JRR Tolkiens novel, starring Martin Freeman, Ian McKellen, Richard Armitage and Orlando Bloom, with Luke Evans, Evangeline Lilly and Benedict Cumberbatch

programme.title: The Hobbit: The Battle of the Five Armies (2014)
programme.desc: Dwarf king Thorin reclaims control of his homeland, but his descent into madness places him on the brink of war with his human and elven allies. As Thorins Hobbit friend Bilbo tries to save the tormented ruler from himself, a vast horde of orcs gathers to destroy them all. Conclusion of the fantasy adventure trilogy, starring Martin Freeman, Richard Armitage, Ian McKellen, Luke Evans and Orlando Bloom

programme.title: The Lord of the Rings: The Fellowship of the Ring (2001)
programme.desc: An unassuming hobbit is plunged into a battle against the forces of darkness when his uncle bequeaths him a magical ring of immense power. He joins a fellowship of heroes to embark on a perilous quest to destroy the ring before it falls into the hands of its creator - a dark lord who needs it to regain his power and conquer the world. The first part of Peter Jacksons epic fantasy trilogy based on JRR Tolkiens novel, starring Elijah Wood, Ian McKellen, Viggo Mortensen, Sean Astin, Christopher Lee, Liv Tyler and Orlando Bloom

programme.title: The Lord of the Rings: The Two Towers (2002)
programme.desc: Frodo and Sam continue their quest to destroy the all-powerful ring, bringing them face to face with the magical artefacts twisted former owner Gollum. Meanwhile, their allies prepare to make a desperate last stand against the vast armies of the corrupted wizard Saruman, who has declared war on a neighbouring kingdom. Part two of Peter Jacksons fantasy adventure trilogy, starring Elijah Wood, Sean Astin, Viggo Mortensen, Ian McKellen, Billy Boyd, Dominic Monaghan, Andy Serkis and Christopher Lee

programme.title: The Lord of the Rings: The Return of the King (2003)
programme.desc: As hobbits Frodo and Sam near the end of their journey into the dark lands of Mordor to destroy the One Ring, the evil Sauron unleashes the full might of his armies on Middle-earth. Meanwhile, Aragorn must fulfil his destiny of becoming king by leading his people into a climactic battle with the forces of darkness. Conclusion of the fantasy adventure trilogy, starring Elijah Wood, Viggo Mortensen, Ian McKellen and Sean Astin

programme.title: Peter Pan (2003)
programme.desc: The adventures of the boy who never grows old, as he whisks Wendy Darling and her brothers away to the magical world of Neverland - where they come face to face with fearsome Captain Hook. Adaptation of JM Barries fantasy novel, starring Jeremy Sumpter, Rachel Hurd-Wood, Jason Isaacs and Lynn Redgrave

programme.title: Harold and the Purple Crayon (2024)
programme.desc: Harold and pals Moose and Porcupine live in a hand-drawn world of limitless possibilities. The trio become concerned when the Old Man, who narrates their illustrated existence, suddenly falls silent. Using his magical crayon, Harold draws a door to the real world and tumbles into the present day as a flesh-and-blood man, who collides head-on with widow Terry and her young son, Mel. Family adventure, starring Zachary Levi, Lil Rel Howery, Zooey Deschanel and Benjamin Bottani

programme.desc: Green-skinned Elphaba Thropp becomes part of the new intake at Shiz University, and shares a room with fellow spell-caster Galinda Upland. Its the beginning of a friendship which culminates in an epic showdown as Elphaba transforms a renegade witch with a skill for bursting into show-stopping songs, like Defying Gravity. Part one of The Wizard of Oz prequel based on the hit stage musical, starring Cynthia Erivo, Ariana Grande-Butera, Jonathan Bailey, Michelle Yeoh and Jeff Goldblum

programme.title: Ready Player One (2018)
programme.desc: In 2045, gamers explore a virtual world in the quest for a deceased tycoons fortune. However, they must also contend with an evil corporation who will stop at nothing to get their hands on the prize. Steven Spielbergs fantasy adventure based on Ernest Clines novel, starring Tye Sheridan, Olivia Cooke, Ben Mendelsohn, Simon Pegg and Mark Rylance

programme.title: One Battle After Another (2025)
programme.desc: Bob is a washed-up revolutionary who lives in a state of stoned paranoia, with his spirited and self-reliant daughter, Willa. When his evil nemesis resurfaces and Willa goes missing, he scrambles to find her as both battle the consequences of their pasts. Paul Thomas Andersons action thriller loosely based on Thomas Pynchons novel Vineland, starring Leonardo DiCaprio, Sean Penn and Benicio del Toro

programme.title: Nobody 2 (2025)
programme.desc: Former assassin Hutch Mansell takes his family on a much-needed holiday, but soon finds himself in the crosshairs of a bloodthirsty crime boss. Comedy thriller, starring Bob Odenkirk, Connie Nielsen and Christopher Lloyd

programme.title: The Cinema List: Video Games
programme.desc: From pixelated beginnings to the big screen, the Cinema List brings you favourite games that made it to the movies - from Sonic the Hedgehog 3, Street Fighter and more

programme.title: On Swift Horses (2025)
programme.desc: Mild-mannered war veteran Lee Walker plans a life of quiet domesticity in California with his wife Muriel and younger brother Julius. Restless after an early discharge from the US Army, Julius steals money from Lee to seek his fortune in Nevada, where he lands a job in security at a casino and sparks forbidden desire with co-worker Henry, which is consummated away from prying eyes. Back in their hotel room, Julius and Henry fantasise about using the same underhand tactics as card sharps to line their pockets. Drama, starring Daisy Edgar-Jones, Jacob Elordi and Will Poulter

programme.title: The Bad Guys 2 (2025)
programme.desc: Struggling to adjust to their newly minted lives as Good Guys, the Bad Guys are offered one last job by a group of all-female criminals. Animated sequel, featuring the voices of Sam Rockwell, Marc Maron and Craig Robinson

programme.title: Caught Stealing (2025)
programme.desc: Former baseball player Henry Hank Thompson foolishly agrees to cat-sit for British neighbour Russ, and walks unwittingly into the middle of a turf war between warring factions. Director Darren Aronofskys comedy thriller, starring Austin Butler, Zoe Kravitz and Matt Smith

programme.title: Final Destination: Bloodlines (2025)
programme.desc: Fifty-five years after her grandparents are involved in a disaster involving a restaurant tower, college student Stefani Reyes is plagued by recurring nightmares of the incident, and returns home seeking answers. The sixth entry in the supernatural horror saga, starring Kaitlyn Santa Juana, Teo Briones and Richard Harmon

programme.title: Superman (2025)
programme.desc: Kal-El, one of the last survivors of the planet Krypton, attempts to protect the people of Earth from evil genius Lex Luthor. Superman is assisted by the Justice Gang, comprising Guy Gardner, aka Green Lantern, Kendra Saunders, aka Hawkgirl, Michael Holt, aka Mister Terrific and Rex Mason, aka Metamorpho. Writer/director James Gunns fantasy adventure, starring David Corenswet, Rachel Brosnahan and Nicholas Hoult

programme.title: Weapons (2025)
programme.desc: At 2.17am, 17 children from the class of Justine Gandy run into the night, arms outstretched, never to be seen again. The only child from the class who remains safely in their bed is Alex Lilly. Distraught parent Archer Graff joins other members of the local community in pointing a finger of blame at Ms Gandy for the shocking turn of events. While she pleads innocence, school principal Andrew Marcus seeks answers along with police officer Paul Morgan. Horror, starring Julia Garner, Josh Brolin, Alden Ehrenreich and an Oscar-winning Amy Madigan

programme.title: Coyotes (2025)
programme.desc: Trapped in their Hollywood Hills home, a family fights for survival when caught between a raging wildfire and a pack of savage coyotes. Comedy thriller, starring Justin Long, Mila Harris and Brittany Allen

programme.title: Flavia (2025)
programme.desc: Flavia de Luce, an 11-year-old amateur sleuth, investigates a murder at her familys manor house when her father falls under suspicion. Family adventure, starring Molly Belle Wright, Martin Freeman, Jonathan Pryce and Toby Jones

programme.title: Blue Moon (2025)
programme.desc: Set over the course of one turbulent night in March 1943, Lorenz Hart, the waspish wordsmith responsible for The Lady Is a Tramp and My Funny Valentine, finds his life unravelling on the opening evening of his ex-partners show, Oklahoma! Director Richard Linklaters biographical comedy drama, starring Ethan Hawke, Margaret Qualley, Bobby Cannavale and Andrew Scott

programme.desc: A body is discovered seven weeks after Libby Squires disappearance, and police try to find the evidence needed to charge the man they believe is responsible

programme.desc: The story of Ted Bundy, a suave, outwardly normal psychology graduate who admitted to killing at least 35 women before being executed in 1989

programme.title: What the Killer Did Next
programme.desc: A students strange disappearance becomes a murder investigation, and detectives face a tough task to prove the suspects guilt

programme.title: Britains Most Evil Killers
programme.desc: The crimes of Christopher Halliwell, the convicted double-murderer responsible for taking the lives of Becky Godden-Edwards in 2007 and Sian OCallaghan in 2011

programme.title: Caught Red Handed
programme.desc: Dominic Littlewood introduces footage of a shop manager forced into fighting off a burglar much stronger than himself, as well as a team of organised criminals on a rampage

programme.title: Caught Red Handed
programme.desc: Dom Littlewood examines the case of a pregnant shop assistant terrorised by robbers, and a centre for adults with learning disabilities is haunted by a mysterious figure

programme.title: Caught Red Handed
programme.desc: When a family shop comes under attack from a gang of thieves, the owner devises a cunning plan, and a teenager coming home late is greeted by a burglar

programme.title: Stop, Search, Seize
programme.desc: Documentary following the work of Irelands border force officers as they fight to stop gangs of organised smugglers from bringing drugs, money, guns, cars and even exotic animals into the country

programme.title: A1: Britains Longest Road
programme.desc: A drunk driver is caught on camera, Northumbria Police respond to a distressing callout and a horse rider is trapped in a terrifying blaze on the way to the Burghley Horse Trials

programme.title: A1: Britains Longest Road
programme.desc: A rush-hour smash puts lives at risk, while a stranded motorist gets a nasty surprise. Series following those working round the clock on the iconic thoroughfare

programme.title: Caught on Dashcam
programme.desc: Fly-on-the-dashboard documentary showcasing outrageous road disasters, captured in video form by drivers in-vehicle dashboard cameras

programme.title: Send in the Dogs
programme.desc: Cocker spaniel Diesel helps his handler PC Adele Gibson and the Territorial Support Group raids a suspected drug den. Sergeant Pete Madden and his German shepherd Brodie are on the trail of car thieves, while Paddy the English spaniel takes to the water with his companion PC John Lane

programme.title: How I Caught the Killer
programme.desc: After finding Susan Eyre dead in a bath full of bleach, detectives narrowed her killer down from 210,000 possible suspects

programme.title: Murder Next Door
programme.desc: A close-knit community rocked by the disappearance of a Scottish teenager in March 2016. As the hours passed without trace, friends, family and neighbours began to fear the worst for the fate of Paige Doherty

programme.title: Worlds Most Evil Killers
programme.desc: Expert criminologists look into the mind of William Suff, who was convicted of killing 12 women in Riverside County, California, throughout the 1980s, and now sits on death row

programme.title: Worlds Most Evil Killers
programme.desc: A profile of the serial killer Todd Christopher Kohlhepp, who claimed the lives of at least seven innocent people between 2003 and 2016

programme.title: How I Caught the Killer
programme.desc: Following murder cases from the first 999 call to guilty verdict. Officers investigate the murder of Christopher Donovan by a gang of youths

programme.title: The Murderer and Me
programme.desc: The story of Suffolk Strangler Steve Wright, who terrorised a community with a string of murders starting in 2006, told from the point of view of the woman who shared his bed

programme.title: Britains Most Evil Killers
programme.desc: The story of Sarah Williams and Katrina Walsh, friends who carried out the evil, jealousy-fuelled murder of businesswoman Sadie Hartley

programme.title: Britains Most Evil Killers
programme.desc: The chilling story of Lee Ford, who killed his wife and four stepchildren in a cold-blooded murder spree over 24 hours in September 2000

programme.title: Forensics: Catching the Killer
programme.desc: When 13-year-old Lucy is reported missing by her mother, police and forensic investigators begin the painstaking search for the truth

programme.title: Forensics: Catching the Killer
programme.desc: Years after the crime, see how forensics helped solve the murder of Becky Godden-Edwards, finding a killer who had sadly murdered again.

programme.desc: A look at whether Michael Steele and Jack Whomes were really guilty of the Essex Boys murders, re-examining the questions that remain about their convictions

programme.title: The Kid Stays in the Picture (2002)
programme.desc: Film producer Robert Evans narrates this documentary chronicling the ups and downs of his extraordinary life. Among the topics covered are his big break into the movie industry, his failed marriage to Ali McGraw, his relationships with Grace Kelly and Ava Gardner, his descent into drug addiction, and his journey back to respectability. With contributions by friends and family, and including footage of a host of Hollywood legends

programme.title: Stevie Van Zandt: Disciple
programme.desc: Tracing the musician and actors career, including his work as a member of Bruce Springsteens E Street Band and his role as Silvio Dante in The Sopranos

programme.title: After the Bite
programme.desc: Documentary investigating the surge in great white sharks patrolling Cape Cods shallow waters and the fallout from one young mans death

programme.title: The Armstrong Lie (2014)
programme.desc: Documentary following cycling champion Lance Armstrongs fall from grace. Film-maker Alex Gibney was initially commissioned to follow the cyclist as he prepared to make a professional comeback by competing in the Tour de France, only to find himself documenting an unprecedented scandal as Armstrong was exposed as having used performance-enhancing drugs

programme.title: Spitfire (2018)
programme.desc: The story of the British single-seat fighter plane the Supermarine Spitfire, designed by RJ Mitchell and famous for its role in the Battle of Britain. Archive footage, new film of the aircraft in flight and interviews with the last surviving veterans who flew the plane in combat combine to tell its story

programme.title: God Bless Ozzy Osbourne
programme.desc: A profile of Black Sabbath member Ozzy Osbourne, from the wild and hedonistic days that adversely affected his personal life, through the years of depression, alcoholism and drug dependency that followed. The programme also reveals how he overcame his demons, with the help of his second wife Sharon. Featuring interviews with Paul McCartney, Motley Crue drummer Tommy Lee and others

programme.title: Nick Caves Veiled World
programme.desc: Documentary exploring the creative universe, enduring influence and impact of the singer-songwriter and artist, whose legacy spans music, literature, film, and visual art. Contributors including musicians Florence Welch, Colin Greenwood and Warren Ellis, designer Bella Freud, film-maker Wim Wenders and writer Irvine Welsh discuss his influence on their own creative work

programme.title: Look Away
programme.desc: Documentary hearing from women groomed in their early teenage years by rock stars, as well as exploring the lengths the music industry went to in order to protect its own

programme.title: Wise Guy: David Chase and The Sopranos
programme.desc: Part two of two. Documentary examining the origins and development of the drama, as well as looking at the life and career of its creator and writer David Chase

programme.title: Striking with Pride: United at the Coalface
programme.desc: A look at people involved with Lesbians and Gays Support the Miners (LGSM) and the Welsh community they supported during the miners strike of 1984-85

programme.title: Ancient Aliens
programme.desc: Meteor impacts have created the perfect environment for humankind. This documentary contemplates whether new evidence reveals that celestial objects have been sent by an alien intelligence

programme.desc: Assuming there is alien life elsewhere in the Universe, could they navigate those vast distances and potentially visit Earth?

programme.title: Alien Disclosure Files
programme.desc: There are three types of close encounters - sightings, fleeting interactions and aliens taking humans for extended periods.This programme catches up with real people who have experienced alien-life up close

programme.title: Celts: The Untold Story
programme.desc: In the second century BC, Celtic tribes established prosperous cities dedicated to trade along the Amber Road and the Danube. However, external threats to their society forced them into smaller fortified settlements known as oppida, triggering their decline in Central Europe

programme.title: Digging for Britain
programme.desc: Alice Roberts visits archaeological digs in the east of the country, unearthing Roman letters that reveal what London was like 2,000 years ago, an East India ship packed with silver, and the first evidence of Caesar in Britain

programme.title: Mysteries from Above
programme.desc: Nubian pyramids reveal the rise of female power in Ancient Kush. Plus, a shocking satellite image uncovers secrets of an ancient ancestral Puebloan site in New Mexico

programme.title: Rust Valley Restorers
programme.desc: A rare Diamond T truck build has Mike and his crew scrambling to keep up with their clients demands. Avery battles a hornets nest, his mother and his own impending sense of doom as auction day arrives and his collection goes on the chopping block

programme.title: Ancient Aliens

programme.title: Historys Greatest Aircraft
programme.desc: The fascinating story behind the Mosquito, the stunning wooden aircraft that undertook some of the most daring and iconic raids of the Second World War

programme.title: Historys Greatest Aircraft
programme.desc: The background and development of one of the Second World Wars most iconic bombers. The Boeing B17, aka the Flying Fortress, served with both the USAAF and the RAF

programme.title: Digging for Britain
programme.sub-title: West - Viking Camp and Iron Age Gold
programme.desc: Alice Roberts visits archaeological digs around the UK, starting with the west of Britain. Finds include the camp from which Vikings invaded Britain and groundbreaking new evidence that the world famous Avebury stone circle isnt just a sacred site, but a place where our ancestors lived and worked

programme.title: Digging for Britain
programme.desc: Alice Roberts visits archaeological digs in the north of Britain, where finds include Scottish man-made islands that help paint a picture of Stone Age tech and evidence for the first Roman siege in the UK. Theres also a look at Lindisfarne, which was violently sacked by the Vikings 1,000 years ago

programme.title: Weird Britain
programme.desc: Andy McGrath heads to the home of palaeontology on Dorsets Jurassic Coast and braves the collapsing cliffs of Lyme Regis to bring back one of its many fossils. While in the county, he investigates UFO-infested hillforts, haunted castles, chalk giants and shares a song with the fairies at the Singing Barrows of Weymouth

programme.title: Weird Britain
programme.desc: In London, Andy McGrath visits Britains oldest shop and the inspiration for Alice in Wonderlands Mad Hatter, drinks coffee with a corpse at a Macabre Museum, uncovers a sacrificial altar in an ancient chalk mine, and discovers a 19th-century time machine hidden in an urban cemetery

programme.desc: Meteor impacts have created the perfect environment for humankind. This documentary contemplates whether new evidence reveals that celestial objects have been sent by an alien intelligence

programme.title: The Lost Women Spies
programme.desc: Assigned to the British War Crime Investigation Unit in post-war Germany, British intelligence officer Vera Atkins pursued her agents fate at Natzweiler and Ravensbruck. Piecing together testimonies, she insisted on obtaining official records to substantiate her findings for upcoming trials. While Vera sought justice for her girls, a letter challenged her verdicts on Noor?s fate. Suspicions of double agents led Vera to hunt down a Nazi mastermind. She was still to determine whether any agents had escapeed, and if not who had betrayed them

programme.title: The Secret Nazi Expeditions
programme.desc: There is power in the debate of the true origins of humanity and it became the fixation of a nefarious power as Heinrich Himmler, leader of the Nazis SS, when he turned his attention to proving the Paleolithic past of Germanys Aryan race

programme.title: WWIIs Most Daring Raids
programme.desc: A mission to take out four German howitzers about to assault Utah Beach during the Normandy landings, carried out by US paratroopers from Easy Company, the 101st Airborne Division

programme.title: Clash of Ancient Warriors
programme.sub-title: The Siege of Paris by the Vikings
programme.desc: Modern scientific techniques are called upon to investigate the mysteries of the most legendary battles from ancient times. This episode revisits 885, when a small army in Paris repelled the Vikings, who had ravaged everything in their path while travelling up the River Seine

programme.title: Clash of Ancient Warriors
programme.sub-title: The Battle of Cannae - Hannibal v Rome
programme.desc: Modern techniques are called upon to investigate the mysteries of the most legendary battles from ancient times. The Battle of Cannae was a major battle of the Second Punic War, taking place in August 216 BC near the town of Cannae in Apulia in south-east Italy. The Carthaginian army under Hannibal destroyed a numerically superior Roman army under command of the consuls Lucius Aemilius Paullus and Gaius Terentius Varro

programme.title: The Abyss: Rise and Fall of the Nazis
programme.desc: A fresh look at the Third Reich from a global and current perspective, telling how the Nazis conquered Germany and then half of Europe within a few years of losing the First World War. This first episode recounts how the clash of right-wing and left-wing political convictions turned the Weimar Republic into a powder keg. The fascist movement then seized power in Italy in 1922

programme.title: The Abyss: Rise and Fall of the Nazis
programme.desc: How the failed coup on November 9, 1923 eliminated Hitler and then movement of some 55,000 members. The Fuhrer and his National Socialist German Workers Party achieved a miserable result in the 1928 Reichstag elections

programme.title: Ancient Aliens
programme.desc: The Mutual UFO Network is an organisation devoted to the scientific investigation of unidentified aerial phenomena and other unexplained encounters. With more than five decades of investigations, MUFONs extensive database could contain proof of extraterrestrial visitation

programme.title: Ancient Aliens
programme.desc: The vast Alaskan wilderness is known for mysterious disappearances, electromagnetic anomalies, stories of strange creatures and UFO sightings. Alaskas many mysteries could be due to a presence that is not of this world

programme.desc: Revelation is the most terrifying book in the Bible, describing mankinds final days. But who will survive Gods wrath? And when will it happen?

programme.title: The Nostradamus Effect
programme.desc: Examining whether a secret manuscript discovered in the Vatican library in 1994 could be the work of Nostradamuss son, and investigating the likelihood of its chilling prophecy coming true

programme.title: The Abyss: Rise and Fall of the Nazis
programme.desc: The defeat at Stalingrad in 1943, which was the turning point of the Second World War and convinced the Nazi leadership to intensify their terror and propaganda campaigns

programme.title: Strangest Things
programme.sub-title: The Pyramid Tool Kit, the Killer Foot Machine and the Lost Head
programme.desc: One hundred and fifty years ago a strange set of objects were found in the Great Pyramid in Giza. A piece of cedar wood with regular marks etched along its length, a two-pronged bronze hook with two pins sticking into it, and a baseball-sized sphere made of granite

programme.title: Ancient Superstructures
programme.desc: The beauty of Notre-Dame de Paris, one of the most exquisite looking cathedrals in the world. The building acts as an icon of French culture and its history, while also attracting the attention of many tourists and aesthetes

programme.sub-title: Close Encounters of the Fifth Kind
programme.desc: The possibility of direct human contact with extraterrestrial life within the highest levels of the US government

programme.title: Historys Greatest Aircraft
programme.desc: The McDonnell Douglas F-15 Eagle, an aircraft that immediately turned the tide of the first Gulf War in 1990. An immaculately restored MiG Killer was involved in one of the most bizarre combat incidents during that conflict, and has survived to tell the tale

programme.title: Historys Greatest Aircraft
programme.desc: The B-25, which was often called the forgotten bomber. This mighty North American twin delivered the first blow in the fight back against Japan, in one of the most daring and audacious raids of all time over Tokyo in 1942

programme.title: Digging for Britain
programme.desc: Alice Roberts visits archaeological digs in the east of the country, unearthing Roman letters that reveal what London was like 2,000 years ago, an East India ship packed with silver, and the first evidence of Caesar in Britain

programme.title: Digging for Britain
programme.desc: Alice Roberts visits archaeological digs in the east of Britain, including new discoveries at a perfectly preserved 3,000-year-old village in Cambridgeshire. She also visits the theatre where Shakespeare premiered Romeo and Juliet and the location of the Battle of Barnet

programme.title: Digging for Britain
programme.desc: Alice Roberts visits archaeological digs around the UK, starting with the west of Britain. She discovers lost First World War training trenches on Salisbury Plain, visits Britains first double henge discovered just down the road from Stonehenge, dives into the English Channel to explore an 18th-century East India company ship packed with silver, and unearths luxury foreign goods discovered at Tintagel, the legendary childhood home of King Arthur

programme.title: Mysteries from Above
programme.desc: Aerial views offer a fresh perspective on massive concrete arrows scattered across America. Plus, a giant chalk figure on an English hillside and a mysterious hole in the middle of a lake in Southern California

programme.title: Life After People
programme.desc: Predicting the fate of priceless artefacts such as the Mona Lisa, the Declaration of Independence and the Liberty Bell in a world without humans

programme.title: Life After People
programme.desc: Examining how the oceans would claim the casinos of Las Vegas and Atlantic City if there were no humans left on Earth, and lead to the proliferation of rats

programme.title: Life After People
programme.desc: The fate of mankinds machinery of war in a hypothetical world without people, as Pearl Harbour comes under attack and snow causes urban avalanches

programme.title: Behind History
programme.desc: An look at collection of figures and groups that have redefined the notion of fame through history, from royal families across the globe to Marilyn Monroe and the Beatles

programme.title: Forbidden History
programme.sub-title: Christ and the Crucifixion: The Real Evidence
programme.desc: A look at the historical evidence of Jesus? crucifixion, from the realities behind the legend, to piecing together what is known for certain and what is missing. The programme highlights how little detail the Bible truly contains - including no reference to a cross - and the lack of archaeological evidence. Narrated by Jamie Theakston

programme.title: World War II: Witness to War
programme.desc: Eye-witness accounts and archival footage describe the German U-boat push into British waters, featuring stories of bravery and new technologies employed in the conflict

programme.title: World War II: Witness to War
programme.desc: The 1941 attack on Pearl Harbour introduced a powerful new element into the war. This documentary features eye-witness accounts and archive footage of the conflict in the Pacific

programme.title: Ancient Aliens
programme.sub-title: Close Encounters of the Fifth Kind
programme.desc: The possibility of direct human contact with extraterrestrial life within the highest levels of the US government

programme.title: Ancient Aliens
programme.desc: Investigating what the God Particle reveals about the origins of the world, and whether clues to its significance could have been left by ancient aliens

programme.title: Discovered by Disaster
programme.desc: The unexpected things revealed by catastrophic disasters, featuring a medieval shipwreck that could reshape history and a Greek version of Atlantis that sank in a tsunami.

programme.title: Discovered by Disaster
programme.desc: Why footprints discovered after a storm are altering English migration history by revealing evidence of early human activity that was previously hidden by the landscape. Such discoveries, often exposed by storm surges and erosion, are providing new insights into who was in England thousands of years ago and how they moved around. Plus, clues are unravelled to Maya political intrigue in Guatemala

programme.title: Craig Charles: UFO Conspiracies
programme.desc: Craig and space journalist Sarah Cruddas consider incidents over the US that it has been suggested are being covered up by the Pentagon. They take on the US Navy UAP videos - the Tic-Tac footage, filmed from the USS Nimitz in 2004 off San-Diego, and the Go-Fast and Gimbal videos filmed between 2014 and 2015 off the East Coast in the Atlantic from the USS Theodore Roosevelt

programme.title: Conspiracy Files: Unsealed

programme.desc: Dan Jones explores the history of Warwick Castle, which started as a motte and bailey fort established by William the Conqueror in 1068 and was transformed into a stone fortress two centuries later by the Beauchamp family. He examines the role Guy Beauchamp played in the kidnapping and murder of one of Edward IIs closest allies and descends into the castles claustrophobic dungeon

programme.title: Secrets of Great British Castles
programme.desc: Dan Jones heads to Gwynedd to explore the history of Caernarfon Castle, the building of which began in 1283 on the orders of Edward I. He demonstrates how the castles vast stone walls and strategically designed towers repelled all enemies, even the Welsh national hero Owain Glyndwr, earning itself a truly forbidding reputation, but its military importance faded at the end of the 15th century when Henry Tudor - a Welshman - made his way on to the English throne

programme.title: Chris Tarrant: Extreme Railway Journeys
programme.desc: The broadcaster explores the use of trains in transporting millions of prisoners to ghettos and death camps during the Holocaust. The programme retraces how the implementation of Nazi Germanys first anti-Jewish laws coincided with a drive to construct the worlds most extensive rail network, and features contributions from survivors, including a Polish man who worked as a child slave in building the railway, who reveals how he narrowly escaped being transported to Auschwitz by hiding in a cemetery

programme.desc: Raksha Dave and Alex Langlands search for the remains of a First World War stable at Catterick Garrison in North Yorkshire, where thousands of horses would have been housed and trained for the front line. They join a team comprised of archaeologists and the military attempting to uncover the role this building played in the war effort. They also visit Britains oldest cavalry regiment, examining tools that soldiers would have used to look after their steeds, and hear the story of Warrior, known as the horse the Germans could not kill

programme.title: Digging Up Britains Past
programme.desc: In 1592, Elizabeth I visited Sudeley Castle in the Cotswolds for a three-day party commemorating the nations victory over the Spanish Armada. Here, Raksha Dave, Alex Langlands and assorted volunteers and archaeologists hunt for a lost garden planted as part of the celebrations, while there is also a visit to Kenilworth Castle to investigate an Elizabethan garden still in full bloom today. Plus, a look at how the gardens Tudor owner, Robert Dudley transformed his estate to win favour with his Queen

programme.title: Great Barrier Reef with David Attenborough
programme.desc: Following his visit to the Great Barrier Reef in 1957, naturalist and broadcaster David Attenborough returns and uses the latest filming techniques to unlock the secrets of the natural wonder. In the first edition, he descends beneath the waves at night and uses cutting-edge technology to generate computer scans of the sea floor. He also learns about a complex community of animals, as well as the annual coral spawning, which is responsible for the great diversity in the reef

programme.title: Great Barrier Reef with David Attenborough
programme.desc: Using the latest technology, the naturalist explores the shark-infested waters of Osprey Reef in the Triton submersible, before returning to the nesting grounds of the Green Sea Turtle, 60 years after his first visit to Raine Island. He also marvels at manta ray cleaning stations on Lady Elliot Island, and tracks dwarf minke whales to discover their surprising reasons for returning, and why the reef is vital for their survival

programme.title: Great Barrier Reef with David Attenborough
programme.desc: The naturalist examines what the next few decades may hold for this remarkable ecosystem, and looks at the work of scientists who are trying to preserve the area and the species that inhabit it, assisted by research vessel the Alucia. He also embarks on an ambitious attempt to dive further into the reef than ever before to witness the resilient coral that live down in the depths and see if they hold answers that may help to overcome challenges that lie ahead, as the impact of humans on the reef continues to take its toll

programme.desc: Exploring how whale sharks drive the culture of Santa Maria, the only European hotspot for these giants and why warming seas may be drawing them in

programme.title: The Kimberley: Australias Wild West
programme.desc: A look at Australias Wild West - The Kimberley - the animals who live there and tracking the quests of those working to protect them

programme.title: Micro Monsters with David Attenborough
programme.desc: David Attenborough employs the latest technologies to explore the violence, rivalries and deadly weaponry existing within the world of bugs. This first episode examines the survival tactics of its terrifying residents including killer ants, trap-setting spiders and beetles with the ability to shoot boiling chemicals at their enemies

programme.title: Micro Monsters with David Attenborough
programme.desc: The broadcaster continues his bug-eyed view of the world of creepy-crawlies, revealing how predators defuse the defences of their prey. Highlights include the cockroach wasp, busy preparing a tasty - and very live - treat for its young, the whirligig beetle, which employs a water-based radar system, and the jumping portia spider, which feeds on other arachnids

programme.title: Micro Monsters with David Attenborough
programme.desc: A further selection of creepy-crawly close-ups, focusing on courtship in the bug world. Highlights include scorpions shaking their booty, the perfume-wearing nasonia wasp and the tropical cricket, for whom romance goes out of the window as it uses bribery to seal the deal with would-be partners. One potential partner to steer well clear of, however, is the praying mantis, the female of which is notorious for eating the male just after - or even during - mating. Narrated by David Attenborough

programme.title: Micro Monsters with David Attenborough
programme.desc: A close-up view of sex, bug-style, as David Attenborough talks viewers through the different ways in which creepy-crawlies reproduce. Size matters for the minuscule male orb spider, creepily sneaking up on its intended and trying to mate without her noticing, while theres no rest for the lothario-like butterfly, which has plenty of notches on its proverbial bedpost. However, the harvestman spider has no use for sex at all, and reproduces by cloning itself

programme.title: Micro Monsters with David Attenborough
programme.desc: David Attenborough shifts the focus to bugs that prefer co-operation rather than conflict. They include burrowing cockroaches, the suitably named social spiders - which share a 30-metre web - the queen bee and her happy hive of workers and green ants pulling together to build a nest

programme.title: Micro Monsters with David Attenborough
programme.desc: The broadcaster concludes his close-up examination of the creepy-crawly world, shifting focus to the bugs ultimate invention - the colony. Key residents of these minuscule mega-cities include honey bees, termites, leafcutter ants - who have a knack for farming - and their Argentine cousins, members of a community so vast it spans an entire continent

programme.title: The Secret Life of the Hermit Crab
programme.desc: The adventures of a small community of Hermit crabs in Guadeloupe during their migration from the cliffs islands northern cliffs to the beaches in the south

programme.title: The Island of Giants
programme.desc: Exploring how whale sharks drive the culture of Santa Maria, the only European hotspot for these giants and why warming seas may be drawing them in

programme.title: Gangs of Lemur Island
programme.desc: In Madagascars remote Berenty Reserve, battle lines are drawn as two ring-tailed lemur gangs face the mounting challenges of the dry season. In the Ruins Gang, Crystals reign of fear makes life hard for some of her subjects, while her rival gang queen Kati of the Museum Gang has found a good food supply for her crew

programme.title: The Big Dry
programme.desc: Zambias Luangwa Valley endures one of the toughest dry seasons imaginable, but for some animals, the drought brings great opportunity

programme.title: The Big Dry
programme.desc: The dry season in Zambias Luangwa Valley, with wildlife having to cope with extreme temperatures and no rain for seven months

programme.title: Wild Pacific Rescue
programme.desc: Dr Marty and the MMR team rush to save a massive sea lion caught in a plastic noose, and an orphaned baby sea otter gets adopted into a new family

programme.title: Wild Pacific Rescue
programme.desc: The rescue team tries to save an otter as Dr Marty battles rough conditions to help an entangled sea lion. At the Rescue Centre, a mischievous seal pup puts himself in danger

programme.title: Lethal Weapon 2 (1989)
programme.desc: Headstrong cop Martin Riggs and his cautious partner Roger Murtaugh stumble across a plot by a South African diplomat to launder drugs money by shipping gold coins into the US via his embassy. Protected by diplomatic immunity, the crook looks certain to evade the law - while his chief henchman has a connection to Riggs traumatic past. Action thriller sequel, with Mel Gibson, Danny Glover, Joe Pesci, Joss Ackland, Derrick OConnor and Patsy Kensit

programme.title: Lethal Weapon 3 (1992)
programme.desc: As Murtagh counts down his last few days on the force before retirement, he and Riggs go on the trail of a former LAPD officer who is using his insider knowledge to steal confiscated weaponry and ammunition, then selling it on to criminal gang bosses. The duo are assigned to work with internal affairs investigator Lorna Cole, while they also get help from old friend - and reformed small-time crook - Leo Getz. Action thriller sequel, starring Mel Gibson, Danny Glover, Joe Pesci and Rene Russo

programme.title: Lethal Weapon 4 (1998)
programme.desc: Mismatched LAPD detectives Riggs and Murtaugh stumble across a ship transporting Chinese immigrants into the US. As they try to get to the bottom of the organisation behind the smuggling, they find themselves up against a master criminal who is an expert in martial arts and heads a triad responsible for people-trafficking and forgery. Action adventure sequel, starring Mel Gibson, Danny Glover, Rene Russo, Joe Pesci, Jet Li and Chris Rock

programme.title: Beverly Hills Cop (1984)
programme.desc: Fast-talking Detroit cop Axel Foley heads for Los Angeles after an old friend is murdered before his eyes. His search for the killers leads him into conflict with a seemingly untouchable drug kingpin, but he also has to contend with the local force, who do not want him taking matters into his own hands. Comedy thriller, starring Eddie Murphy, Judge Reinhold, Ronny Cox, John Ashton and Steven Berkoff

programme.title: Beverly Hills Cop II (1987)
programme.desc: Wisecracking Detroit detective Axel Foley returns to Los Angeles to investigate the shooting of an old friend, and uncovers a connection with a spate of violent robberies carried out by a criminal who leaves a mysterious calling card. Comedy thriller sequel, starring Eddie Murphy, Judge Reinhold, John Ashton, Ronny Cox and Brigitte Nielsen.

programme.title: Beverly Hills Cop III (1994)
programme.desc: Maverick cop Axel Foley returns to Los Angeles when an investigation into a colleagues murder leads him to a Hollywood theme park. He enlists the help of old ally Rosewood to prove the resort is a cover for a major counterfeiting ring connected to a terrorist conspiracy. Comedy adventure sequel, starring Eddie Murphy, Judge Reinhold, Theresa Randle and Bronson Pinchot.

programme.title: Jurassic Park (1993)
programme.desc: Scientists are given a sneak preview of a safari park inhabited by genetically engineered dinosaurs created by an eccentric tycoon. However, it all goes wrong when a greedy employee sabotages the security systems, allowing the prehistoric beasts to roam free and hunt the visitors. Steven Spielbergs action adventure, starring Sam Neill, Laura Dern, Jeff Goldblum, Richard Attenborough and Samuel L Jackson

programme.title: The Lost World: Jurassic Park (1997)
programme.desc: Scientist Dr Ian Malcolm reluctantly joins a research team on the island where his employer first designed genetically engineered dinosaurs. Meanwhile, a big-game hunter takes the chance to bag the biggest prize of all - a Tyrannosaurus rex. Steven Spielbergs dinosaur adventure sequel, starring Jeff Goldblum, Julianne Moore, Pete Postlethwaite and Richard Attenborough

programme.title: Jurassic Park III (2001)
programme.desc: Palaeontologist Dr Alan Grant is lured to a dinosaur-infested island by a divorced couple who offer to fund his research, unaware their real motive is to find their missing son - and that the creatures on the island are far more intelligent than anyone suspected. Action adventure sequel, starring Sam Neill, William H Macy, Tea Leoni and Alessandro Nivola

programme.title: Ghostbusters (1984)
programme.desc: Three eccentric scientists put their hi-tech gadgetry and knowledge of the paranormal to money-making use by setting up in business as freelance ghost catchers. A musician calls them in to investigate when she sees strange creatures in her kitchen, only to end up possessed. As the spook-hunting team members deal with an attempt to shut their operation down, they discover an evil demonic entity is being summoned into existence and it falls to them to stop this creature from destroying the world. Supernatural comedy adventure, starring Bill Murray, Dan Aykroyd, Harold Ramis, Sigourney Weaver, Ernie Hudson and Rick Moranis

programme.title: Ghostbusters II (1989)
programme.desc: The eccentric spectre-hunters reunite to save New York from a massive river of slime generated by the citizens negativity and nasty thoughts. Meanwhile, the spirit of a 16th-century tyrant tries to return to the land of the living by possessing the body of a toddler. Sequel to the supernatural comedy, starring Bill Murray, Sigourney Weaver, Dan Aykroyd, Harold Ramis, Rick Moranis and Ernie Hudson

programme.title: Ghostbusters (2016)
programme.desc: When a series of supernatural disturbances occurs in New York City, two experts in the paranormal investigate, joined by a brilliant inventor who has created an array of ghost-hunting gadgets and a public transport worker whose knowledge of the city provides vital clues to the sinister cause of the ghostly activity. Reboot of the 1980s comedy franchise, starring Kristen Wiig, Melissa McCarthy, Kate McKinnon, Leslie Jones and Chris Hemsworth

programme.title: Beverly Hills Cop (1984)
programme.desc: Fast-talking Detroit cop Axel Foley heads for Los Angeles after an old friend is murdered before his eyes. His search for the killers leads him into conflict with a seemingly untouchable drug kingpin, but he also has to contend with the local force, who do not want him taking matters into his own hands. Comedy thriller, starring Eddie Murphy, Judge Reinhold, Ronny Cox, John Ashton and Steven Berkoff

programme.title: Beverly Hills Cop II (1987)
programme.desc: Wisecracking Detroit detective Axel Foley returns to Los Angeles to investigate the shooting of an old friend, and uncovers a connection with a spate of violent robberies carried out by a criminal who leaves a mysterious calling card. Comedy thriller sequel, starring Eddie Murphy, Judge Reinhold, John Ashton, Ronny Cox and Brigitte Nielsen.

programme.title: The Cinema List: Bingeable
programme.desc: On the Cinema List, join us as we explore our favourite franchises to get cosy with, from Transformers to Bad Boys 2. Snuggle down on the sofa and take your pick

Comedy adventure sequel, starring Eddie Murphy, Judge Reinhold, Theresa Randle and Bronson Pinchot.

programme.title: The LEGO Movie (2014)
programme.desc: An ordinary man leading a life of blissful ignorance in a city made of the construction toy is mistakenly identified as a chosen one destined to save the universe. He joins a mismatched band of heroes in stopping a plan to fix the world permanently in place. Animated comedy, with the voices of Chris Pratt, Elizabeth Banks, Morgan Freeman and Will Ferrell

programme.title: The Lego Movie 2: The Second Part (2019)
programme.desc: Five years after events of the first film, teenager Finn has rebuilt Bricksburg into a post-apocalyptic wasteland. When Emmet is plagued by a vision of an impending cataclysm, he and Lucy fight to protect their beloved city from invaders. Animated adventure, featuring the voices of Chris Pratt, Elizabeth Banks and Will Arnett

programme.title: The Lego Ninjago Movie (2017)
programme.desc: Shunned by everyone for being the son of an evil warlord, a teenager seeks to defeat him with the help of his fellow ninjas. Animated adventure, with the voices of Jackie Chan, Dave Franco and Fred Armisen

programme.title: The Hangover (2009)
programme.desc: Three men on a stag weekend in Las Vegas wake up after a night of heavy drinking and find they have not only misplaced the groom, but somehow gained a tiger and a baby. Unable to remember the details of the night before, they set about piecing the clues together in the hope of finding their missing friend. Comedy, starring Bradley Cooper, Ed Helms and Zach Galifianakis

programme.title: The Hangover Part II (2011)
programme.desc: Phil, Stu and Alan reunite in Bangkok for another stag weekend, but having learned the lessons of their previous misadventures, resolve to keep this one quiet and alcohol-free. Things inevitably do not go according to plan, and they must once again piece together the events of a wild night they cannot remember. Comedy sequel, starring Bradley Cooper, Ed Helms and Zach Galifianakis

programme.title: The Hangover Part III (2013)
programme.desc: Drinking buddies Phil and Stu try to help their troubled friend Alan get his life in order, only to stumble into another bizarre misadventure. The Mob have taken Alans brother hostage and to free him, they have to track down manic gangster Mr Chow, who has escaped from a Thai prison. Comedy sequel, starring Bradley Cooper, Ed Helms, Zach Galifianakis and John Goodman

programme.title: Dumb and Dumber (1994)
programme.desc: Dimwitted Rhode Island limousine driver Lloyd Christmas and his equally vacuous friend Harry Dunne embark on a disaster-fraught cross-country trip to Aspen, where they hope to reunite a briefcase with its female owner. However, the pair are unaware the case contains a $1million ransom they would have been better leaving well alone. Farrelly brothers comedy, starring Jim Carrey, Jeff Daniels, Lauren Holly, Teri Garr and Mike Starr

programme.title: Dumb and Dumberer: When Harry Met Lloyd (2003)
programme.desc: The half-witted duo meet for the first time as teenagers and band together to face the perils of high school - and prove they are intelligent enough to leave remedial classes behind. Comedy prequel, starring Eric Christian Olsen, Derek Richardson, Rachel Nichols, Eugene Levy and Mimi Rogers

programme.title: Miss Congeniality (2000)
programme.desc: A feminist FBI agent is sent undercover as a contestant in the Miss United States pageant when the event becomes the target of a terrorist bomb threat. As she is not exactly catwalk material, a veteran British coach is brought on board to oversee her transformation into a glamorous beauty queen. Comedy, starring Sandra Bullock, Michael Caine, Benjamin Bratt, Candice Bergen and William Shatner

programme.title: Grimm
programme.desc: A creature is found drowned in wet cement, putting Nick and Hank on the trail of a troll running a protection racket. Meanwhile, Juliette invites Eddie over for dinner to thank him for saving her life. Guest starring David Zayas (Dexter), with David Giuntoli and Russell Hornsby

programme.title: Warehouse 13
programme.desc: Myka and Pete deal with a zombie plague spread by an unknown artefact, and Claudia tries to reach Jinks. Sci-fi thriller, starring Eddie McClintock, Joanne Kelly and Saul Rubinek

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Glenn reveals to everyone that the barn is full of captured walkers - news that infuriates Shane, who decides they all need to be destroyed. Meanwhile, Rick and Hershel return with two more captives, planning to keep them alive, but this pushes Shane over the edge and he forces the survivors into a bloody confrontation

programme.desc: A teenage girl befriends a new classmate, unaware that her new friend is an angel sent to protect her from an impending vampire apocalypse

programme.desc: The ship is attacked by a strange alien life form, leaving the Doctor to find a solution. Sci-fi adventure, starring Kate Mulgrew and Robert Picardo

programme.title: The Hobbit: An Unexpected Journey (2012)
programme.desc: Unassuming hobbit Bilbo Baggins is pulled out of his comfortable life when Gandalf the wizard volunteers him for a dangerous quest. He joins a party of dwarves who are on a mission to reclaim their lost homeland, which has been taken over by a dragon. When the group journeys into the Misty Mountains, Bilbo becomes separated from the dwarves and falls into a cave, where he finds himself confronted by Gollum and forced to play a riddle game. It is set in Middle-earth 60 years before the events of The Lord of the Rings and is the first part of Peter Jacksons fantasy adventure trilogy based on JRR Tolkiens novel, starring Martin Freeman, Ian McKellen, Richard Armitage, James Nesbitt, Ken Stott, Cate Blanchett, Ian Holm and Christopher Lee

programme.title: Star Trek: Voyager

programme.title: Star Trek: Voyager
programme.desc: Kim and Tuvok fall for the same holodeck character, and only Vulcan mind-control techniques seem to offer the possibility of averting an emotional clash. Sci-fi drama, starring Kate Mulgrew, Tim Russ and Garrett Wang

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: As Carl slowly recovers from his operation, Daryl ventures alone into the woods to search for the boys missing friend Sophia. Dale and T-Dog get a shock as they collect water from a nearby well and a trip to the pharmacy for medical supplies ends unexpectedly for Glenn and Maggie. Back at the farm, Hershel grows impatient with the newcomers, while Lori suspects she may be pregnant

programme.title: The Walking Dead

programme.desc: ITVs revival of the hit BBC sitcom, starring Linda Robson, Pauline Quirke and Lesley Joseph. programme.title: Birds of a Feather
programme.desc: Now that Sharon has given up work, Tracey is the only one in the house bringing in a wage, and its not nearly enough to pay the bills, so Dorien kindly offers to dip into her savings to help out. However, when she calls the bank it emerges every penny she had has been spent on legal fees. In desperation, the sisters take their old friend to a car-boot sale and sell her beloved collection of designer clothes, right down to the shoes on her feet - which are snapped up by former TOWIE star Amy Childs. Sitcom, starring Pauline Quirke, Linda Robson and Lesley Joseph

programme.title: Birds of a Feather

programme.title: Birds of a Feather

programme.title: Birds of a Feather

programme.title: Birds of a Feather

programme.title: Birds of a Feather

Linda Robson, Pauline Quirke and Lesley Joseph star in the hit sitcom

programme.desc: Sheldon and Amy try to eliminate stress from the planning of their wedding by applying mathematics to the process. Meanwhile, Raj breaks up with Howard after realising that his best friend is actually damaging his confidence

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Sheldon and Howard plan respective birthday celebrations for Amy and Halley. A letter from his brother makes Leonard feel anxious about his own lack of accomplishments. The series takes a mid-season break until the new year.

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Sheldon and Amy subject their friends to a series of secret tests to find out who is most qualified to act as best man and maid of honour at their wedding. Penny realises her true feelings about her friendship with Amy

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: When Sheldon kicks Amy out of the apartment so that he can have some alone time to work, she and Leonard bond during a series of science experiments. Bert the geologist replaces Howard in his band Footprints on the Moon, and Sheldon finds Penny to be a surprising source of scientific inspiration. Laurie Metcalf and Brian Posehn guest star

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Raj finds himself in the middle of a domestic drama when he realises that the woman hes dating, Nell, has a husband, Oliver, who is very upset about their new relationship. Sheldon rents his old room back to have a quiet place to work and drives Leonard crazy by being a model tenant

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Sheldon petitions Wil Wheaton to allow him to appear on the new Professor Proton show, so the actor offers a guest appearance to Amy instead. Meanwhile, Penny gets angry when she thinks the female protagonist in Leonards novel is based on her

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Bernadettes friends each try different tactics to help her go into labour. Howard isnt happy when he finds out that Bernadette has already chosen their sons name without his input

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: While Leonard jumps through hoops to help secure the perfect wedding venue for Sheldon and Amy, Howard and Bernadette have a difficult time deciding which one of them should stay at home with the kids and who should return to work

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Penny gets the opportunity to spend time with Bill Gates at work, because his business wants to partner with her pharmaceutical company. programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Leonard runs against Sheldon to be president of the tenants association, while Bernadette encourages Howard and Raj to track down the owner of a drone they find in the back garden

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: A brilliant but reclusive scientist, Dr Wolcott, invites Sheldon to his cabin in the middle of nowhere, so Leonard, Raj and Howard go along for the trip. Penny and Bernadette improvise when Amy doesnt like the tame bachelorette party they have planned for her. Peter MacNicol guest stars

programme.title: Georgie and Mandys First Marriage
programme.sub-title: A Tie Breaker and A Huge Mistake
programme.desc: Tensions rise when new co-owners Georgie and Ruben realise they cant agree on anything. Jim struggles to find his purpose now that hes retired.

programme.title: Georgie and Mandys First Marriage
programme.desc: Georgie is upset when Mandys new role as weekend weather girl gets her more attention from the men in town, and Connor turns to Jim for help.

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Sheldon isnt pleased by the newfound popularity of Stuarts comic book shop when an author puts the place on the map. When Raj attempts to take the credit for Pennys astronomical discovery, friendships are tested. Howard and Bernadette try to arrange a date night

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Sheldon goes to Las Vegas and does everything he can to win a large sum of money for science. Meanwhile, Penny and Bernadette take Amy shopping for a wedding dress, but her terrible choice entangles them in a web of lies

programme.title: Millionaire Murders

programme.title: Millionaire Murders
programme.desc: Mike heads out onto the lake and never returns. It is believed he drowned and was eaten by alligators.

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: A case involving an abandoned car in Philadelphia. Police found the drivers body the next day, and unusual marks on her corpse led investigators to her killer

programme.title: UK Crime Files: Tracking a Serial Killer
programme.desc: A look into the case of two mens bodies being found in neighbouring flats in Derby. A dangerous killer is on the loose and detectives need to act before more people die.

programme.title: UK Crime Files: Murder: Smoke and Lies
programme.desc: A look at the case of Nikitta Grender, who was found dead after a flat fire in 2012. Forensics showed she and her unborn daughter were murdered.

programme.title: Murder UK
programme.desc: Years after David Clarkes death, a confession tape reveals a betrayal between feuding neighbours in the UK.

programme.title: Close Calls: On Camera

programme.title: Close Calls: On Camera
programme.desc: A family breaks down on a busy road with no hard shoulder, and a lorry driver fails to see the obstruction. Plus, a speedboat trip sees the vessel swamped by a wave. programme.title: Close Calls: On Camera

programme.title: Britains Almost Perfect Murders

programme.desc: Rachel Entwistle believes her husband to be Prince Charming, but he lives a secret life of sex and porn, and the pressure of hiding his secret becomes too much for him

programme.desc: Neville receives an anonymous letter telling them a murder is about to be committed. Not long after, he and Naomi are called to the harbour when a body is pulled from the ocean. Sun-kissed detective drama, starring Ralf Little, Don Warrington and Ginny Holder

programme.title: Death in Paradise
programme.desc: Following Nevilles arrest on suspicion of killing David Cartwright, DI Karen Flitcroft from the Department of Policing Standards arrives to investigate. CCTV footage shows an agitated Neville visiting the victim shortly before he was found dead, which as far as Flitcroft is concerned proves his guilt - so she advises the team members that if they are convinced of their inspectors innocence, they must prove it quickly. Robert Webb guests stars in the crime drama, with Ralf Little

programme.title: Inspector George Gently
programme.desc: Bacchus and Gently hunt for the murderer of a woman whose body is discovered in a local church. As the investigation progresses, it turns out the victim was a waitress working at the first hostess club in Newcastle - an establishment that has greatly upset the local religious community. Martin Shaw and Lee Ingleby star, with guest appearances by Brendan Coyle (Lark Rise to Candleford) and Mark Williams (The Fast Show)

programme.title: Father Brown
programme.desc: The ecclesiastical sleuths services are called upon when a medieval murder is committed at a battle re-enactment. Crime drama, starring Mark Williams, Tom Chambers and Claudie Blakey

programme.title: Father Brown
programme.desc: The ecclesiastical sleuth investigates when rehearsals for A Most Perfect Murder are derailed by a dramatic death. Crime drama, guest starring Christopher Fairbank, with Mark Williams, Tom Chambers and Claudie Blakley

programme.title: Father Brown
programme.desc: The ecclesiastical sleuth investigates when an old friends daughter is plagued by otherworldly visions. Crime drama, starring Mark Williams and Claudie Blakley

programme.title: Father Brown
programme.desc: The crime-solving cleric investigates when murder threatens to derail the live broadcast of agricultural radio drama, The Muckles. Fifties-set crime drama based on the stories by GK Chesterton, starring Mark Williams, with Martin Jarvis and Rosalind Ayres

programme.title: Shakespeare and Hathaway: Private Investigators
programme.desc: An energy tycoon hires Frank and Lu to keep an eye on his daughters, one of whom is going off the rails and the other is about to get married - but things quickly get out of hand

programme.title: Shakespeare and Hathaway: Private Investigators

programme.title: Miss Scarlet and the Duke

programme.title: Murdoch Mysteries
programme.desc: A battle of the sexes tennis match is disrupted when the woman playing is injured, and Chief Constable Brackenreid discovers that it was sabotage

programme.title: Father Brown
programme.desc: Bunty reunites with Father Brown to uncover a dark secret and mysterious goings-on at the local girls borstal. Crime drama, starring Mark Williams and Emer Kenny

programme.title: Death in Paradise
programme.desc: Neville receives an anonymous letter telling them a murder is about to be committed. Not long after, he and Naomi are called to the harbour when a body is pulled from the ocean. The victim suffered blunt trauma and it is soon suggested that his disgruntled wife may be a person of interest. Marlon returns after taking a short holiday following his disappointing exam results. Sun-kissed detective drama, starring Ralf Little, Don Warrington and Ginny Holder

programme.title: NCIS: Sydney
programme.desc: When a US Navy researcher is found dead at a glitzy tech launch in a secret underground bunker, part of the team heads over to investigate, only to end up trapped inside

programme.title: Death in Paradise
programme.desc: Following Nevilles arrest on suspicion of killing David Cartwright, DI Karen Flitcroft from the Department of Policing Standards arrives to investigate. CCTV footage shows an agitated Neville visiting the victim shortly before he was found dead, which as far as Flitcroft is concerned proves his guilt - so she advises the team members that if they are convinced of their inspectors innocence, they must prove it quickly. Robert Webb guests stars in the crime drama, with Ralf Little

programme.title: Death in Paradise
programme.desc: The Caribbean-set crime drama returns, and there is a double celebration as the show marks its landmark 100th episode and Commissioner Selwyn Patterson celebrates 50 years of service. However, the party is cut short when the boss is shot by a mysterious assassin and left fighting for his life. As the team members search for the culprit, will the police veteran survive? Starring Ralf Little, Don Warrington and Shantol Jackson

programme.title: Red Dwarf
programme.desc: Lister and Rimmer finally arrive back on Earth, only to discover they have slipped through a time hole into a period where everything occurs backwards. Sci-fi space comedy, starring Chris Barrie and Craig Charles

programme.title: Red Dwarf
programme.desc: The ship is on a collision course with five black holes and Holly recommends that the crew members abandon Red Dwarf and regroup after the danger is over. Cat and Kryten take off in Blue Midget, while Lister and Rimmer make their escape in Starbug, but are marooned when it is hit by a meteor and crash lands on an icy planet. Starring Chris Barrie and Craig Charles

programme.title: Red Dwarf
programme.desc: A grotesque, salivating genetic mutant goes on the rampage aboard the ship, spreading terror and stealing the crews emotions, leaving Lister without fear and Rimmer with no anger. Sci-fi comedy, starring Chris Barrie, Craig Charles and Frances Barber

programme.title: Not Going Out
programme.desc: Lee and Lucys discussion about whether they should have another child descends into psychological warfare. Comedy, starring Lee Mack and Sally Bretton

programme.title: Not Going Out
programme.desc: Lee and Lucy think they have bought the perfect Christmas present for seven-year old Charlie and five-year-old twins Benji and Molly. However, their pride in their parenting is short-lived when the youngsters grandparents buy exactly the same gift and beat them to the punch by handing it over on Christmas Eve. Lee ventures into the streets on the night before Christmas and faces a desperate race against time to find a suitable replacement. Lee Mack and Sally Bretton star in a festive episode of the sitcom

programme.sub-title: Ellie Taylor, Fin Taylor, Tez Ilyas

programme.desc: Comedians Celya AB and Neil Delamere perform stand-up at the Hammersmith Apollo, hosted by Lou Sanders

programme.title: Live at the Apollo
programme.desc: Maisie Adam hosts the comedy show filmed at Londons Hammersmith Apollo, warming up the audience before introducing stand-up routines by fellow comedians Michael Odewale and Susie McCabe

programme.title: Gadget Man
programme.desc: Richard Ayoade is joined by Radio 1 DJ Sara Cox to test innovative devices for helping people get through their morning routines, including a magic mirror and a machine that promises to propel users from the bedroom and wash, dress and feed them automatically. He also encounters some unusual vehicles while experiencing a commute at dawn with John Humphrys, host of Radio 4s Today programme
